programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Enough Is Enough
programme.desc: A troubled family suffers a serious car accident; Dr. Webber's marriage may need healing.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Make Me Lose Control
programme.desc: Meredith's mother's illness is revealed when she is brought to the hospital.

programme.title: The Closer: L.A. Woman
programme.desc: A businesswoman is gunned down in Hollywood; Brenda locks horns with the FBI while investigating the murder of an Iranian businessman.

programme.title: The Closer: Fatal Retraction
programme.desc: A botched murder investigation with faulty evidence is revealed after the body of a woman, believed to have been a murder victim of a death-row killer three years before, shows up in the morgue.

programme.title: Major Crimes: D.O.A
programme.desc: The squad investigates a brutal murder, but they soon find that dark secrets are at the root of an apparent drug bust gone wrong.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: In a case that brings gang violence and social profiling to the forefront, things are not always as they seem. Meanwhile, Sharon offers Jack the opportunity to be a court-appointed attorney in the case.

programme.title: Major Crimes: The Deep End
programme.desc: The media goes into a frenzy over race relations when the body of a young Latino man is found at the home of a white award-winning swimming coach. Meanwhile, Flynn struggles with an emotional dilemma on the eve of his daughter's wedding.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: It Takes a Village
programme.desc: Mummified remains of a woman put the team's investigative skills to the test. Jane works from her hospital room as she, with Maura's and her family's support, seeks to recover from a devastating loss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: Three college students are killed walking along a footpath over the course of six years. Police know they're dealing with a serial killer, but the hard part is catching him.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Bombs and Betrayal

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Cashed Out
programme.desc: When a mother of six is viciously slain in her Sarasota home, police wonder if her wealthy ex-husband might have been involved in the crime?

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Murder in the Mansion

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Bombing of Oklahoma City: The Explosion (Part 1)
programme.desc: In 1995, Timothy McVeigh, a 26-year-old U.S. army veteran, detonated a truck bomb outside a federal building in Oklahoma City. We take a look back at the events that led up to the largest domestic terrorist attack in the history of the United States.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Bombing of Oklahoma City: McVeigh's Shocking Confession (Part 2)
programme.desc: In an exclusive prison interview, Timothy McVeigh himself describes how events in his personal life and the world around him inspired him to kill his fellow Americans. We also hear from survivors of the bombing and family members of the victims.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Boston Marathon: Reconstructing the Crime Scene (Part 1)
programme.desc: On April 15th 2013, two bombs explode during the iconic Boston Marathon, killing three spectators and injuring hundreds others. In a race against time, investigators, using state of the art technology, circulate images to the public.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Boston Marathon: The Manhunt (Part 2)
programme.desc: With the Boston Bombing suspects identified as domestic terrorist brothers, the manhunt begins, a terrifying crime spree ensues, and new information sheds light on the heinous crime.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Kidnapping of Elizabeth Smart (Part 1)
programme.desc: Elizabeth Smart was kidnapped from her home, snatched from her bed at knifepoint by a man in the middle of the night. We look at the unbelievable nine month saga of the police investigation and family fight to keep hope alive.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Three Million Dollar Bet
programme.desc: With just $100 in their pockets, three business titans are dropped in unfamiliar cities, stripped of their names, money, and contacts and given a simple challenge: build a $1 million business in just 90 days.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier Exposed: Fighting Fire with Fire
programme.desc: To protect the homestead from wildfires, Otto dynamites a reservoir in case of an emergency. Charlotte goes fishing with Jane but finds it's not for her. After falling behind on the Fox Cabin, Atz Sr. enlists the help of his family to get back on track.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Backyard Prey
programme.desc: As fall approaches, the Kilchers kick into high gear. A large bull moose stalks the homestead and Eivin must keep his family safe. Atz Sr. hunts bear and nearly loses a horse. Otto begins the massive cleanup from an explosive wildfire prevention project.

programme.title: Cal Fire: A Devil Comin' at You
programme.desc: Lightning strikes in Monterey County ignite two deadly fires. Chief Campbell battles the River Fire while the Carmel Fire forces evacuations ten miles away. When the River Fire suddenly turns towards basecamp, it's an all-out race to stop it.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: The Raneys make a self-automated homestead to function while firefighters Kim and Casey Boespflug are away on duty.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Chad vs. Pinto
programme.desc: Chad takes on his most ambitious build yet: transforming a rusted-out 1971 Pinto into a European-style performance car framed in glass. With only four weeks to work and a mountain of problems facing him, Chad risks missing a deadline for the first time.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Performance Pinto
programme.desc: The team continues converting the rusted '71 Pinto into a European performance car despite the passed deadline. Unwilling to compromise on the original vision, Chad presses on both day and night to get his creation ready for its dramatic big city reveal.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Grudge Wars
programme.desc: After a tough season of in-fighting and game playing, the racers of the 405 come together for a grudge race night, hoping to squash all the issues they have with each other.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Eyes on the Prize (Bristol 2019) Part 1
programme.desc: The racers will give it their all to win the $200 000 at the Bristol No Prep race.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Don't Rain on My Parade (Bristol 2019) Part 2
programme.desc: Sixteen racer move in round two of the Bristol No Prep, but the racers must adjust their tunes for a trickier track after a rainfall.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Coming Back to Life
programme.desc: Chief can't refuse an invitation from Boddie to go out West for a race. The OKC racer head out for an epic night of racing with more than $20,000 on the line.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Money
programme.desc: The 405 is in California taking on Boddie and his group of racers, but the night is off to a bumpy start. With both money and pride on the line, see if Oklahoma can come together to take home the big win.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Bring the Boys Back Home
programme.desc: Ready for another season of list racing, the 405 is hoping to put the past behind them, come together and make street racing fun again. But on race night, the same old games threaten to break them apart before they start.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Run Like Hell
programme.desc: Farmtruck and AZN head to Kansas to fish with the new and improved Gonorail. Back in Oklahoma, Ryan and Dominator repair broken cars in preparation for list racing, but when a driver gets out of control, the evening is brought to an abrupt end.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Time
programme.desc: Monza gets a chance to come for the list after his wreck, Shawn makes plans to get back into the top five, Farmtruck and AZN find a fun use for discarded airbags. Later, drivers make up for the lack of racing the previous week.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Racer vs. Racer: Time Attacks

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Racer vs. Racer: Testing the Competition
programme.desc: The baddest street racers recall their toughest competitions, best engines and more including a competitive test session between Chief and Dave as Ryan looks over his car.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Samantha's Story

programme.title: Movie: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: A tomboy FBI agent goes undercover in a beauty pageant to prevent a terrorist bombing.

programme.title: Movie: The Proposal
programme.desc: When a pushy businesswoman learns that her VISA has run out and she'll be deported back to Canada, she forces her assistant to marry her. Her assistant agrees to the plan, but only if she promises to give him a promotion.

programme.title: Movie: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry Roth, a veterinarian who's afraid of commitment, falls in love with Lucy who suffers from short-term memory loss. In an attempt to win her over, Henry sets out to remind Lucy why she fell for him the first time by romancing her each new day.

programme.title: Movie: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry Roth, a veterinarian who's afraid of commitment, falls in love with Lucy who suffers from short-term memory loss. In an attempt to win her over, Henry sets out to remind Lucy why she fell for him the first time by romancing her each new day.

programme.title: Kevin Hart: What the Fit: Roller Fitness with Tiffany Haddish
programme.desc: Kevin Hart joins good friend, Tiffany Haddish at Moonlight Rollerway for a day of fitness rollerblading with LA Roller Girls. Also, Ken Jeong.

programme.title: Kevin Hart: What the Fit: Goat Yoga with Khloe Kardashian
programme.desc: Kevin Hart joins Khloé Kardashian in a goat yoga class.

programme.title: Kevin Hart: What the Fit: Muscle Beach with James Corden
programme.desc: Kevin Hart heads to Venice Beach, California to meet comedian James Corden for a workout at the legendary Muscle Beach. Also, Leslie Jones.

programme.title: Kevin Hart: What the Fit: Sumo Wrestling with Conan O'Brien
programme.desc: Kevin Hart gets his endorphins going by sumo wrestling with Conan O'Brien.

programme.title: Kevin Hart: What the Fit: Gymnastics with Terry Crews
Kevin Hart: What the Fit: Mascot Training with Keke Palmer and Kevin Hart
programme.desc: Kevin Hart and Keke Palmer train with Otto, the mascot from Syracuse University. They learn firsthand that mascots have tremendous physical conditioning.

programme.title: Kevin Hart: What the Fit: Recreational Rodeo with Leslie Jones
programme.desc: Kevin Hart picks up Leslie Jones and heads to Gibson Ranch for a rodeo workout consisting of bathing a horse and roping a mechanical bull. Also, Scott Eastwood.

programme.title: Kevin Hart: What the Fit: Country Club Chaos with Chelsea Handler and Kevin Hart
programme.desc: Kevin Hart and Chelsea Handler practice their golf, badminton and lawn bowling skills at a country club.

programme.title: Celebrity Game Face: Bid On Bae and Puppet Charades
programme.desc: Jim Gaffigan and Jeanie Gaffigan, Tamera Mowry and Adam Housley and Meagan Good and DeVon Franklin compete remotely from their own homes in a night of fun and games hosted by Kevin Hart.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: Love Me, For Me
programme.desc: Three months after giving birth, Khloé returns and shares her story with her mom. Deeran is paired with a celebrity trainer in hopes of finding the courage to tell his father the truth and be accepted as he is.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: The Twins and the Bullied Brother
programme.desc: After losing both parents by their teens, twins Ashley and Amber turned to food to cope. Logan was bullied for being overweight by his older brother, which in turn led him down a path that ended in injury and weight gain.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: Becoming Amy and From Scrawny to Brawny
programme.desc: Amy had a wake-up call when she and her daughter were kicked off an amusement park ride due to her size. Eddie's first love cheated on him with "buffer" men and he went into a spiral of self-hate and body shame.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: Hungry for Love and The Fighter
programme.desc: Kay has been closed to love since her husband left her after the loss of their unborn child and turned to food as her companion. Javier takes his street fighting skills to the boxing ring to make his family proud after leaving a violent gang.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: The Widow and the Hollywood Executive
programme.desc: After losing the love of her life in a deadly car crash two years ago, Carolina gained 30 lbs and put her life on hold. Khloé pairs her with celebrity trainer Latreal Mitchell who helps her move past the pain.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: The Emotional Eater and the Dancer
programme.desc: Hayley has spent her life living in fear of her father, resulting in her seeking comfort in food. By pairing her with celebrity trainer Corey Calliet, Khloé hopes Hayley will find the courage to confront her father.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: The Single Mom and the Disappointing Daughter
programme.desc: At eight months pregnant Terra found out that her boyfriend was cheating on her. Alone and about to become a single mom, Terra drowned her feelings with food.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up: Kardashian Rewind
programme.desc: Take a nostalgic look back at the stories that made the Kardashians who they are today, with an exclusive look ahead to season 11.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The New Normal
programme.desc: Even though things are changing for the Kardashian family in ways they never expected, they are determined to remember that family always comes first.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Somewhere Over the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: Kris starts dating someone after 25 years with Bruce, and no one is more critical than her daughters. Khloé ends up in hot water over a controversial Instagram post, and Kim gets a lesson in manners when she tries to recruit Kourtney for her video game.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Carfather
programme.desc: When Scott has a flurry of suspicious activity and vague business dealings, the family decides to pull back the curtain on Scott's man-of-mystery persona. Kris worries she's made a mistake with her living will; Kim stops Bruce from spending all his money.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Retreat
programme.desc: With Rob in crisis, the family intervenes, but when Rob refuses help, Kris is at her wit's end. Khloé leads a Dash teambuilding retreat, and Kim learns that getting pregnant again might not be in the cards.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Last Judge Standing Tournament: Part 1
programme.desc: Eight Triple G judges compete for the title of Last Judge Standing and $40,000 for charity. Guy spins a wheel to determine whose least favorite ingredients will wind up in their steak house dinner.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Last Judge Standing Tournament: Part 2
programme.desc: Judges combine numbers and letters while making a pasta dish with only eight ingredients beginning with the letter 's'. The bottom three chefs enter a wild card round where one must make a comfort food dish in an international cuisine style.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Last Judge Standing Tournament: Part 3
programme.desc: The six remaining judges are put into teams of two to make a regional seafood dish on a budget with a twist. The bottom two teams must each cook for themselves in the redemption round then elevate a guilty pleasure to make it to the semi-finals.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Last Judge Standing Tournament: Part 4
programme.desc: The remaining judges must create their best cheese dish while playing three of the hardest games. The winner heads to the finale and the remaining judges make a refined meal with ingredient from impromptu alley.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Last Judge Standing Tournament Finale: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The final four make a chicken dinner of the panelist's least favourite foods, then play a food pyramid game to determine ingredient weights and what must be their dish. The final two make a meal of seven unusual ingredients to win $40,000 for charity.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Farm-to-Table and Horse Racing
programme.desc: Boot Camp challenges help the recruits understand how food gets from the farm to their fork. Chefs Anne Burrell and Carla Hall show them how to make meatless meals, and the recruits are judged on their pairings of seasonal fruit and meat.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Mustache Takeover
programme.desc: Talented chefs Saransh Oberoi and Tom Cuomo bring their skills and enviable mustaches to the kitchen to intimidate Bobby Flay on two levels. David Burtka and Donatella Arpaia are there to cheer them on and perhaps convince Bobby to grow some facial hair.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Going Global
programme.desc: Chef Richard Blais recruits TV personality Laura Vitale to try to knock Bobby Flay down a peg or two. They enlist the help of global food enthusiasts Chef Reza Setayesh and Chef Andy Gaynor to make Bobby's world spin.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Reunion With a Song

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Afternoon Escape
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood plans a fun day for her friends by taking them to an escape room! But first, they fuel up with coconut vodka cocktails, cornbread panzanella, roasted Cajun nuts and oven beer can chicken.

programme.title: The Kitchen: No Carb Left Behind

programme.title: The Kitchen: Lovin' in the Oven

programme.title: The Kitchen: Winter Weeknight Wins
programme.desc: The Kitchen tackles a week's worth of warming winter dinners, starting with Fusilli with Sausage and Oyster Mushrooms. There's also an Easy Beef French Dip with Quick Jus, Sheet Pan Blackened Salmon with Garlicky Kale and Strawberry Crostata for dessert.

programme.title: Kitchen Crash: Getting Stuffed in Jersey
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro brings three chefs to Paramus, N.J., to convince homeowners to hand over food from their kitchens. With those ingredients, the competitors are challenged to serve festival-style food, something 'stuffed' and street-fair dishes.

programme.title: Chopped: Sunny Side Apps

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Outside
programme.desc: The family goes to visit Richard's dad. Based on his basic living standards and extended absence from Richard's life, they assume Frankie must have done a stretch in the slammer. When he visits, they decide to turn their house into a prison.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Loophole
programme.desc: When Gumball and Darwin give Bobert instructions on how to behave properly, Bobert applies his own logic to the rules.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Copycats
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin meet Kiki and Quack, a pair of siblings that copy everything they do and say. When they realize their whole family is making money online imitating the Wattersons, they realize they need a solution.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Fuss
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin are planning on seeing the scariest movie of the year, but everyone else has already seen it, and won't stop talking about it. Gumball is determined to avoid spoilers.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Catfish
programme.desc: Grandpa Louie has no friends on Elmore Plus, so Gumball and Darwin, feeling bad, create one called Muriel. Granny Jojo finds out that Louie has been spending time online with 'another woman' and sets out to destroy her, despite her not being real.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The News
programme.desc: All the breaking stories from the Elmore newsroom.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Cycle
programme.desc: Gumball, Darwin and Anais find out that Mr. Wilson has been bullying their dad most of his life. The kids try to help their dad and ultimately seek revenge against Mr. Wilson.

programme.desc: When a tornado rips through Laurel, the home Ben and Erin renovated for Nancy and Richard T Jones is severely damaged. They vow to not only restore it to its pre-tornado condition, but to re-imagine it.

programme.desc: A photographer and close friend of the Napiers is looking for a traditional home with a touch of modern style. After deciding on a classic mansion in need of a complete makeover, Ben and Erin transform the tired house into a show-stopping home.

programme.desc: A couple is looking for a house where they can entertain friends in a walkable neighborhood. Ben and Erin give their pick a complete facelift by adding a coastal color scheme, built-in banquet and a back patio that's perfect for entertaining.

programme.title: Good Bones: Mina's East Street Investment
programme.desc: Mina and Steve think it's time to renovate a rental property they purchased three years ago so they can sell it for Jack's college fund. Karen and Mina formulate a plan to transform the house into an urban Hampton's retreat with marble and wood shingles.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Beginner's Luck
programme.desc: A lottery skeptic won $1 million on the first scratch ticket she ever bought. Now, with the help of property ace David Bromstad, she and her husband set out to buy the perfect retirement palace in sunny Florida.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: California Chick House
programme.desc: A young-at-heart grandmother wants to buy the perfect "chick house" after a $785,000 PowerBall win. David Bromstad helps her find an adorable home big enough to entertain her huge family but small enough to maintain by herself.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Lakeside Bonanza
programme.desc: After deciding to pass the time with a scratcher, a man and his family found themselves $10-million richer.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: The Long Island Dream
programme.desc: After winning $3 million on a scratcher, a NYC couple can afford to buy a home back in their old neighborhood of Northport, Long Island. They must decide if they want to purchase a waterfront property or get more for their money away from the coast.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: The Sound of Freedom
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners go on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Million-dollar Siblings
programme.desc: A pair of siblings vowed to their late father they would always look out for one another, so when one won the lottery, he didn't hesitate to split it.

programme.title: Movie: Dangerous Matrimony
programme.desc: While avenging her sister's death, Portia runs into a man with her sister's heirloom necklace, and a pregnant woman with her own agenda. Things take a sudden turn when the couple is kidnapped and Portia is forced to negotiate their release.

programme.title: Movie: Fiancé Killer
programme.desc: Nicole is delighted when her daughter Cameron returns from a vacation with a fiancé named Brent. Then, she finds out Brent has intentions to kill her with his secret girlfriend Lexi.

programme.title: Movie: The Wrong Fiancé
programme.desc: A photographer is sent out of town on an assignment and she uses the chance to distance from her ex.

programme.desc: When romance blogger Nora seeks inspiration for her book by having a passionate fling with her sexy next door neighbour, her 'no strings attached' relationship quickly spirals into a dangerous obsession.

programme.title: Movie: Left for Dead
programme.desc: A woman must piece together the details of the accident as they slowly return to her. When she finally remembers that she has a daughter who's missing, she must lead the police to the girl's kidnappers.

programme.title: Movie: Was I Really Kidnapped?
programme.desc: A woman is released from her abductors hands, and goes to police to file a report. While speaking to detectives, her story begins to unravel and she is forced to clear her own name, and identify her attackers.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters: The Secret of the Red Shed
programme.desc: The AIMS team sets off to track down one of the cloaked figures at the heart of the mystery of Spearfinger. Willy and Wild Bill sneak down for a recon mission, and the team realizes the key to their quest is in the rock overhang and the red shed.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters: The Twisted Torch
programme.desc: The AIMS team searches for Jeff after he is drawn away by a mysterious cloaked figure. Their frantic hunt leads them to a pair of finely crafted torches that shed light on the Cherokee folklore surrounding Spearfinger.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters: A Tribute to Trapper
programme.desc: The remaining members of the AIMS team gather around a campfire to celebrate the life of team leader and friend John 'Trapper' Tice. Tears are shed and laughter echoes throughout the Appalachian night sky as they relive their favorite Trapper moments.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: New Evidence
programme.desc: The team re-examines their findings from last year's expedition in Oregon and reveals stunning new evidence. Plus, the new Bigfoot target zone is revealed along with never-before-seen footage of the remarkable next chapter of their journey.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Search Continues
programme.desc: After coming closer than ever to proving the existence of Bigfoot in Oregon, the team continues their search in the mountains of Kentucky. They'll spend the next two and a half weeks in search of Sasquatch, unless it finds them first.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Call and Response
programme.desc: After receiving a recording of an alleged Bigfoot call, Bryce blasts the howl over a speaker to elicit a response. With Russell positioned high on a hill and Ronny and Mireya down in the valley below, the team may get the encounter they're looking for.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters: The Wolves of West Virginia
programme.desc: The surviving members of AIMS head out on a brand-new adventure that team leader Trapper set up for them before he passed. Equipped with Trapper's journal, they travel to the mountains of the Tygart Valley to prove there are still wolves in West Virginia.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters: The Mystery of the Death Cat Barn
programme.desc: The AIMS team investigates the mysterious barn where they heard the roar of the Cherokee Death Cat. Their quest to catch the ferocious feline leads to a shocking discovery no one is prepared for.

programme.desc: After several years of blood, sweat and tears, Shereé unveils Chateau Shereé at a housewarming party that is one for the Atlanta history books. At the party, things heat up when Kenya finds herself going toe-to-toe with a mega-blast from the past.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Ten Ten, Twenty Twenty
programme.desc: Porsha returns home from her second arrest in Kentucky and also reveals that she and Dennis have called it quits. Kenya offers Cynthia marital advice and juggles her fast track friendship with LaToya.

programme.desc: After nearly spoiling Cynthia's proposal last year, Kenya seeks redemption with a surprise engagement dinner. Kenya uses the opportunity to confront Porsha about being uninvited to her party.

programme.desc: After nearly spoiling Cynthia's proposal last year, Kenya seeks redemption with a surprise engagement dinner. Kenya uses the opportunity to confront Porsha about being uninvited to her party.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Montcalm and Carry On
programme.desc: Josh Altman is caught between his fiancée and his client in a deal that could result in triple commission. Josh Flagg refuses to give up as he struggles to attract a buyer for his historic hilltop listings. The Brits' partnership begins to unravel.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: White Wedding Day
programme.desc: Josh and Heather prepare to say their vows in Aspen, but first face off in a tough negotiation that could keep them from walking down the aisle. Josh Flagg lists a coveted lot in the Beverly Hills flats, but his strategy backfires.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Zeppo Marx the Spot
programme.desc: Josh Flagg lists a mid-century modern home built by Zeppo Marx, and must fight off developers looking to bulldoze the iconic structure. Newlyweds Josh and Heather return home from their wedding and are up against a ticking clock to find their dream house.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Turn and Burn

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Surf vs. Turf

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Fortune in Flames
programme.desc: Rick has the chance to buy a flamethrower and Corey and Chumlee head to an auction to bid on a classic gypsy fortune-teller machine.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Monkey Business
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars take aim at a hat believed to have been worn by movie legend John Wayne. An etching that may have been done by Rembrandt and a classic 1950s clapping chimp are also up for grabs.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Honest Abe
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are presented with an Abraham Lincoln campaign ribbon from the 1860 presidential race. Then, Chumlee and the Old Man have a chance to buy a fully functional 19th century dynamite detonator.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Case Closed
programme.desc: A man brings in a detective's case file from the infamous Lindbergh baby kidnapping. Rick and Chumlee stare down the barrel of a 17th century gun.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Les Is More
programme.desc: A 1961 Les Paul SG guitar and a moon-landing edition of National Geographic magazine come into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Little Pawn Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: The crew has their eye on a football signed by the 1967 Chicago Bears.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Secret Admirer
programme.desc: Open wide with the Pawn Stars when an early 1900s Peerless Harvard dental chair rolls into the shop. Then, Rick gets ready to party on when memorabilia from the 1990s movie 'Wayne's World' is brought in. Later, Rick gets a secret admirer.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Hidden Treasure
programme.desc: A tree with an 1800s revolver inside it takes root in the shop. Then, Chumlee gets creative when checking out a Renaissance etching by Pietro Faccheti. Later, the old man demands the shop give a Senior Citizen's Day discount.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Sunday Funday
programme.desc: A ball signed by NFL hall of famer Walter Payton spirals into the shop. Then, when a program from the first Super Bowl rushes in, Corey is forced to make a game-time decision. Later, the Old Man decides who has to work the day of the big game.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Wilde Card
programme.desc: Read between the lines with the Pawn Stars when a first edition of Oscar Wilde's 'The Happy Prince' is brought into the shop. Then, Corey steps into the ring with a 1972 telegram that rejects Muhammad Ali from fighting in Alaska.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Mystery Caller
programme.desc: A Superman vs. Muhammad Ali comic and an Edward Hopper charcoal piece arrive at the shop. Then, Rick begins to think the office phones are broken.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Pawn Awakens
programme.desc: A one-of-a-kind 'Star Wars' packaged Boba Fett prototype strides into the shop, and an early 1900s Shelby bicycle wheels in. Then, Steve Grad wows Rick with his otherworldly 'Star Wars' autographed poster and massive card collection.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Racing Revolution
programme.desc: A limited edition 2014 Hertz Penske GT Mustang; a 1600s lobster tail helmet from Oliver Cromwell's army; an old fashion apple peeler.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Death and Taxidermy
programme.desc: Get spooked out with the Pawn Stars when a 1547 edition of 'The Dance of Death' haunts the shop. Next, things get whimsical when two sculptures from Dr. Seuss' unorthodox taxidermy collection are brought in. A tear-gas baton forces its way into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Balloon Payments
programme.desc: Rick may cross the line when he calls in a surprise expert for an appraisal on a Ronald McDonald balloon inflator. Chum pursues an antique RCA inkwell, while Corey sets his sights on a vintage spear.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: By Land or By Seep
programme.desc: Rick thinks about taking a big risk and removing six Picasso etchings from a renowned illustrated edition of 'Lysistrata.' Chumlee checks out some vintage ThunderCats toys from the 1980s. Rick and Corey debate about bringing an amphibious jeep off land.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Thar She Pawns
programme.desc: Rick goes to check out a 1974 Triumph Convertible. Two whale spears find their way into the shop. Chum reminisces over a pair of Popeye water pistols.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Some Serious Coinage
programme.desc: A sale of the first American coin ever made has Rick thinking it was 'mint' to be, but at a serious cost. Corey and Chum envision a future for an antique 'Jetsons' cartoon lunchbox that is zooming across their counter. Rick gets ancient self-help.

programme.title: Movie: Cabaret
programme.desc: A British writer befriends an American girl singing in pre-war Berlin nightclubs.

programme.title: Movie: The Remains of the Day
programme.desc: A proper British butler sacrifices his happiness to remain faithful to his position in the years before the Second World War. His ties are tested when he learns of his master's Nazi ties.

programme.title: Movie: 84 Charing Cross Road
programme.desc: A friendship blossoms between a New York City woman and a British bookseller.

programme.title: Movie: The Dumb Girl of Portici
programme.desc: A poor girl falls in love with a nobleman, with their affair triggering a catastrophe.

programme.title: Movie: Dark Habits
programme.desc: Singer hides in a Convent and finds out what nuns are like.

programme.title: Movie: What Have I Done to Deserve This?
programme.desc: Chaos consumes the Madrid home of a pill-popping cleaning lady.

programme.title: Movie: The Liquidator
programme.desc: A killer-for-hire gets mixed up with a plot to assassinate England's Prince Phillip.

programme.title: Movie: Hotel
programme.desc: The manager of a New Orleans hotel and the tangled lives of his various guests.

programme.title: Movie: Seven Seas to Calais

programme.title: Movie: Trader Horn
programme.desc: Two adventurers on a safari in the jungle are saved by a beautiful blonde girl.

programme.title: Jessie: Rossed at Sea Part One
programme.desc: While on vacation, the Ross family finds a girl stranded in the middle of the ocean and invites her aboard their yacht. Meanwhile, Bertram stays home and babysits Mrs. Kipling, who has separation anxiety from Ravi.

programme.title: Jessie: Rossed at Sea Part Two
programme.desc: While exploring an Italian island, the Ross family's tour guide tells a story about Jessie's necklace, and how its curse brings anyone who wears it bad luck in love.

programme.title: Jessie: Rossed at Sea Part Three
programme.desc: Jessie abruptly ends the Ross family vacation because the kids are constantly fighting. They wind up in a pickle when they find the yacht the next morning floating in the middle of the sea with no captain or crew in sight.

programme.title: Movie: Descendants 3
programme.desc: The teenage daughters and sons of villains return to the Isle of the Lost to recruit more teens to join them at Auradon Prep. However, when a barrier breach threatens the safety of Auradon, Mal decides to close the barrier for good.

programme.title: Movie: The Swap
programme.desc: When classmates Ellie and Jack unexplainably trigger a real-life swap, they must figure out how to get back in their own bodies before the swap becomes permanent.

programme.title: Jessie: A Close Shave
programme.desc: Darla shows up and doesn't know that Jessie called off her wedding, so Jessie gets Tony to act like Brooks to try and fool her. Meanwhile, Luke is still trying to master the art of shaving his face for the first time.

programme.title: Jessie: But Africa Is So ... Fari
programme.desc: After misinterpreting that Jessie has gone to Africa to reunite with Brooks, the kids hop a private flight to Africa to stop her. Turns out, Jessie wasn't there, but now must go with Bertram to retrieve the kids.

programme.title: Jessie: Karate Kid-tastrophe
programme.desc: Emma rebels with loud music, adult clothes, and a bad attitude. She ends up getting suspended from school and running away. Jessie learns her whereabouts and manages to get Emma to open up about what's bugging her.

programme.title: Jessie: Moby and Scoby
programme.desc: When Jessie goes back to college, her and Ravi end up sharing the same class. Zuri brings home a baby giraffe from Africa.

programme.title: Jessie: Basket Case
programme.desc: Eager to play in Luke's basketball game, Ravi unexpectedly runs into LA Clippers star Chris Paul, who he enlists to coach him. Meanwhile, Jessie learns that Hudson is her new classmate and is unhappily forced to partner with him for an assignment.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Inn Trouble
programme.desc: Camp Kikiwaka gets a surprise visitor...Hazel! Hazel says she's changed, so Lou agrees to let her hang out for a few days. The boys attempt to earn the camp’s highest honour.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Between A Raccoon and a Hard Place
programme.desc: Gwen befriends a group of campers called the "Extreme Team," known for their gutsy outdoor activities. They invite Gwen to hike to Dead Horse Drop, and she accepts.

programme.title: Jessie: A Doll's Outhouse
programme.desc: After the girls watch a scary movie, Jessie tries to help Zuri conquer her fear of dolls by confessing her own fear of porta-potties. Cameron teaches Ravi how to impress a girl, and Bertram listens to opera non-stop to win a radio contest.

programme.title: Jessie: Beauty and the Beasts
programme.desc: At a pageant, Jesse runs into her nemesis Nanny Agatha. Luke and Ravi play practical jokes on Bertram.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Ticking Clock
programme.desc: With winter on its way, Alaskans battle the clock to stockpile everything they will need to survive the coming months.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Last Minute Push
programme.desc: As the thaw comes to an end, the last-minute push to prepare for winter means the pressure is building.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: End of Days
programme.desc: Summer is drawing to a quick close, and the Alaskan winter lurks right around the corner. Before the tundra freezes over and the herds become scarce, Sue Aikens has limited time to hunt enough caribou to sustain herself for the harsh winter ahead.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Ready or Not
programme.desc: Sue sets off on a quest for food to survive the coming freeze. Andy and Kate race to get their fish wheel turning. The Hailstones build a cache to store caribou, and Glenn sets out on the most critical hunt of the year in hopes to harvest a moose.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Armed for Winter
programme.desc: In Noorvik, the Hailstone family goes caribou hunting to put up meat for the winter. In Kavik, a bear poses a threat to clients at Sue’s camp. In Eagle, Andy repairs the fish wheel to protect the dogs’ food supply.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Out of Control
programme.desc: Alaskans are preparing for the winter months. In Eagle, Andy hunts for elusive moose. In Kavik, Sue seals up camp and heads to Fairbanks for a foot procedure. In Chandalar, Glenn repairs his cabin ahead of the harsh winter.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: The Unknown
programme.desc: As temperatures grow colder, the Alaskans continue to prepare for the winter months.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Jersey Shore Dogs
programme.desc: The Jersey Shore is in for a dose of discipline when Cesar heads for the boardwalk to help three families deal with their out of control dogs' situations.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar's Worst Bite
programme.desc: Kelly and Hyrum Lai always knew their picture-perfect life together would include a dog, but early on their Lab puppy Holly began displaying disturbing behaviour.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Anger Management
programme.desc: Cesar helps Robert Schwartzman, the lead singer and guitarist for the rock 'n' roll band Rooney, with his adopted pit bull Sandy.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: High Anxiety

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Stand by Your Manatee

programme.title: Africa's Wild Side: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: Determination is deceit is needed to win at mating on the African plains.

programme.title: How It's Made: Kitchen Accessories, Vacuums, Paper Mache, Hydraulic Cylinders
programme.desc: Find out how kitchen accessories, central vacuums, paper mache animals, and hydraulic cylinders are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Recycled Skateboards, Braided Pastry, Construction Trailers
programme.desc: This episode includes recycled skateboards, braided pastry, construction trailers and metalworking vases.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Greatest Icons
programme.desc: Places that were once home to Hollywood films and world-famous musicians are now run-down, abandoned, and forbidden; experts investigate their mysteries and reveal the astonishing secrets behind ten of the world's most iconic abandoned places.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Anarchy on Ireland's Alcatraz
programme.desc: The ruins of an abandoned prison are evidence of a chaotic riot that put the prisoners in charge. Special access to its burnt-out interior reveals how inmates took over Ireland's Alcatraz and why it is deserted today.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Killer in the Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned castle is the site of hundreds of horrific murders perpetrated by the mysterious countess who once lived there, a woman alleged to be one of the most prolific killers in history; new discoveries reveal what really happened here.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Floating Pyramid
programme.desc: Surrounded by a mysterious trench, only one Egyptian pyramid was ever constructed to look like it floats on water; using pioneering drone-scanning technology, experts decode the ancient secrets of the pharaoh that are locked inside its hidden tunnels.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Curses and Ghosts
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard investigate the man accused of forging evidence of Vikings in America, testing a crucial piece of evidence with DNA analysis: an ancient skull that may have alien origins.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Relic of Mystery
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare teams up with a Midwestern history enthusiast to investigate a mysterious relic that could be evidence of Viking settlement in America centuries before Columbus, but some think it's a hoax.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Floating Pyramid
programme.desc: Surrounded by a mysterious trench, only one Egyptian pyramid was ever constructed to look like it floats on water; using pioneering drone-scanning technology, experts decode the ancient secrets of the pharaoh that are locked inside its hidden tunnels.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Curses and Ghosts

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Relic of Mystery

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Killer in the Castle

programme.title: Lost Kingdom of the Black Pharaohs
programme.desc: The Kush Empire was an ancient superpower that dominated the Nile Valley and rivaled the Egyptians, and now, a new, cutting-edge investigation at a mysterious tomb could reveal the secrets of this formidable lost kingdom.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Planet 9
programme.desc: Scientists have discovered a mysterious ninth planet on the very edge of our solar system. Ten times the size of Earth, this strange world could have moons with extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: How Black Holes Made Us
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that Black holes might have been essential to creating stars, giving light, and building the universe itself, and aren't the violent monsters we think they are.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Planets From Hell
programme.desc: Over the last twenty years we have discovered an extraordinary zoo of planetary nightmares outside our own solar system, all of them truly wild worlds, a collection of monsters. Discussing if all new planets are planets from hell.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Did the Big Bang Really Happen?
programme.desc: New discoveries are causing astronomers to question if the Big Bang really happened, and using the latest science, they investigate if it wasn't just the start of our universe but many mysterious multiverses.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Evidence
programme.desc: The discovery of extraterrestrial life might face an impossible challenge: the physics of the universe itself. Using cutting-edge technology, experts might be on the verge of a groundbreaking find and the evidence could already be in hand.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Quasar Enigma
programme.desc: Quasars are the brightest and most powerful objects in our universe, and though they have shaped the cosmos, they might ultimately destroy everything that exists.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dark History of the Solar System
programme.desc: Our solar system hides a dark and violent past, and new discoveries reveal that Earth and the planets were formed from the destruction of strange alien worlds that came before us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Strange Lives of Dwarf Planets
programme.desc: Our solar system is home to hundreds of strange, tiny worlds called dwarf planets, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of these mysterious places.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Death of the Last Stars
programme.desc: Our universe's stars are dying off faster than new ones are born, and using the latest technology, experts investigate the secrets of the last stars of the cosmos and what this stellar apocalypse means for life on earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Life
programme.desc: The latest discoveries suggest that we might be on the verge of discovering life beyond our planet, and scientists are investigating if earth's life began elsewhere in the universe, and whether we need to evolve to know for sure.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: The Empty Chair
programme.desc: The day after a snowstorm, high school freshman Shaun Ouillette vanishes. His mother searches for three desperate weeks. But when an anonymous letter leads detectives into the frozen woods, they make a discovery that will tear the small town apart.

programme.title: American Monster: Falling Down
programme.desc: Alene and George Jenkins are the perfect couple living a perfect life. When their desire for children leads them to adopt a son and a daughter it seems their family is complete. But instead it triggers a dark spiral ending in an unspeakably awful crime.

programme.title: American Monster: Twice Shy
programme.desc: Carol-Ann and James Sharp seem like a match made in heaven, but behind the veneer of happiness hides a monster in plain sight. Loved ones close to the couple sit down for the first time on camera to make sense of a murder that none of them saw coming.

programme.title: American Monster: Body Type
programme.desc: Jason and Lindsey Lee are destined for each other; however, marriage can have its highs and lows. When the young couple decide to change their lifestyle to reignite the spark in the relationship, it comes with deadly consequences.

programme.title: American Monster: Stay with Me
programme.desc: Diana Lovejoy and husband Greg Mulvihill live happily in southern California. But when accusations rock the marriage and a mysterious phone call ends with an attempted murder, police uncover the shocking truth behind this once dream couple.

programme.title: American Monster: Hoop Dreams
programme.desc: High achieving Keonte Chavis has always relied on her big, loving family to support her dreams. But when a sudden disappearance leads to a disturbing murder, they all face a dark and terrifying reality - the predator is one of their own.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Christina's Story
programme.desc: When a young girl vanishes while walking her dog on a military base, it marks the beginning of a missing persons case that would capture the hearts of the entire county.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Shadow of Suspicion
programme.desc: A young woman travels to California in pursuit of a Hollywood dream and winds up the victim of a savage homicide.

programme.title: American Monster: Hoop Dreams
programme.desc: High achieving Keonte Chavis has always relied on her big, loving family to support her dreams. But when a sudden disappearance leads to a disturbing murder, they all face a dark and terrifying reality - the predator is one of their own.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Christina's Story
programme.desc: When a young girl vanishes while walking her dog on a military base, it marks the beginning of a missing persons case that would capture the hearts of the entire county.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Long Sought Truth
programme.desc: Decades of investigation reveal the long-sought truth behind the terrifying abduction and murder of a young mother of three.

programme.title: American Monster: Body Type
programme.desc: Jason and Lindsey Lee are destined for each other; however, marriage can have its highs and lows. When the young couple decide to change their lifestyle to reignite the spark in the relationship, it comes with deadly consequences.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: The Last Shot
programme.desc: Single father of four Richard Mannion always follows his heart. But when the 42-year-old is found shot dead in his home, police suspect he may have been looking for love in all the wrong places. Somewhere in his tangled web of romance hides a killer.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Carnage
programme.desc: Elizabeth Palmer works with Matt Scott in Southern California's housing industry. When their brutally murdered bodies are discovered side by side in their office, investigators are initially stumped by the gruesome execution style killings.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: The Devil's Ranch
programme.desc: A college student goes missing on Spring Break, and authorities work around the clock to locate him. When a man runs a drug checkpoint, the investigation takes a grisly turn into a world of drug smuggling, the occult, and human sacrifice.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Dungeon of Dread
programme.desc: When an off-duty police officer in San Francisco happens upon a minor theft at a lumberyard one Sunday afternoon, he unwittingly jumpstarts an investigation into one of California's deadliest, most depraved serial killers: Leonard Lake and Charles Ng.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: A Murder She Wrote
programme.desc: An Iowa mother is hailed a hero when she shoots an intruder in her home. But as the case evolves, investigators learn things are far from what they seem. Detectives face off against a master manipulator hell-bent on revenge at any cost.

programme.title: Dateline: Rear Window
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead inside her Jacksonville Beach apartment, police hope they’ll quickly find her killer. Instead, it takes more than a year to find a microscopic clue and a huge stroke of luck to solve their case.

programme.title: Dateline: The Feud
programme.desc: Even in a peaceful place, like just south of Glacier National Park in Montana, tempers can flare and personalities will clash.

programme.title: Dateline: The Family Secret
programme.desc: A long-haul truck driver goes missing and his family is concerned.

programme.title: Homicide City: Winter's Bones
programme.desc: A skeleton is discovered on the edge of a high school football field, during a game of catch. It takes a forensic sculptor, tireless detective work, and some luck, to finally bring the mysterious killer to justice.

programme.title: Homicide City: Main Line Massacre
programme.desc: When Philadelphia Mainliners Courtlandt and Alexandra Gross are found murdered in their home, detectives begin the hunt for a calculated killer which takes them from one of the wealthiest zip codes in the country straight into the heart of Philly.

programme.title: Homicide City: A Russian Tragedy
programme.desc: When Russian mortgage broker Fay Zonis is found murdered in her office, for seemingly no reason, it sends chills through Philadelphia's Russian-American community. As detectives hone in her killer, the investigation sends shockwaves around the world.

programme.title: Homicide City: Danger Comes Home
programme.desc: When 78-year-old, George Volz's family finds him hogtied and decomposing in his Philly row house, police turn to the neighborhood for help.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.desc: In Texas, Dan and Emily find a waterfront home on Cedar Creek Lake that has tons of potential but needs a lot of work. They hope their budget is enough to give them the open floor plan and modern farmhouse look they desire.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Jackson Lake Remake
programme.desc: A couple hopes to escape their busy lives in Atlanta with a vacation home on Jackson Lake, Georgia. They find the ideal property for their blended family, including three kids, but face a growing renovation list on a tight budget.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Wolf Lake Escape
programme.desc: New parents look to escape their busy New York City lives with a move to Wolf Lake, a small, rustic lake community in upstate New York. The properties they consider require significant renovations and may break the bank.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: City Slickers Off the Grid
programme.desc: Chase and his team of builders renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers. With limited resources, Chase and his team work to incorporate the comforts of city living into the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Oyster Farm Shack
programme.desc: Ashley Morrill and her team of builders find themselves rebuilding an old oyster shack for a working oyster farm in Edgecomb, Maine.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Off-The-Grid Renovation
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team renovate an off-the-grid hunting cabin deep in the woods of Oxford, ME. They have a budget of $20,000 and a time frame of six weeks. They face many challenges associated with building off-the-grid.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Stable Family Ties
programme.desc: Chase and the crew have their work cut out for them turning a vacation cabin that was originally a 1920s horse barn into a stable building for a large family. The crew draw on the past as inspiration and want to honour the owners' late parents.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Kansas City, Missouri
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Kansas City, Missouri in order to challenge three-pound almond butter and jelly sandwich known as the Elvis Challenge, a four-meat pizza with a tater top topper and a brisket sandwich piled high.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Omaha to satisfy his hunger in the heartland. He chows down on a historic Reuben sandwich, a soul food feast featuring fried chicken from a 100-year-old recipe.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Green Bay
programme.desc: Adam is at the NFL's opening game in Green Bay to showcase the city's best eats.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Breakfast Bonanza
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tour of tasty treats has convinced him that breakfast is the most important meal of the day, and he's inducting his favorites into the Man v. Food Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fight Club Sandwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe meets his match with some knock-out fruity feasts at the Florida Strawberry Festival in Plant City. He starts the day with the strawberry French toast burger and slurps the way better strawberry shake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hot Dog Time Machine
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes a trip to the Coastal Carolina Fair near Charleston, S.C., where he samples a local legend, Jack's Cosmic Dog. Trolling the fairgrounds, Noah catches the catfish sundae and takes a bite of fall flavors with the pumpkin cheesecake pop.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Ham-let
programme.desc: Noah heads to San Diego and hams it up at the Balboa Park December Nights festival. The day starts off right with a breakfast Belgian waffle called the "Ham I Am."

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A-Frying in Winter
programme.desc: Noah Cappe chills out with some cool Twin City treats at the Saint Paul Winter Carnival. Despite sub-zero temperatures, he gets into the spirit with local specialties like the Nordic Waffle Pizza and the super-indulgent Biergarten Cupcake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the hometown hero, the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Citizen Candy Cane
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Greater Baton Rouge State Fair for a helping of Cajun treats, like the Cajun Boudin Taco and Pecan Pie Pop. Then he's off to bask in the lights -- and eats -- of the Aurora Winter Festival in Toronto, Canada.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Let Them Eat Sweets
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson knows there's one flavor that's always exciting - sweets! It doesn't matter if it's fruity, chocolatey or pure unadulterated sugar, there are endless ways to hit the sweet spot. So get your sweet tooth ready!

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Flavors of the World
programme.desc: From Cuban cuisine to South Korea's legendary dishes, Eddie Jackson brings a taste of delicious, authentic flavors from around the world to please the taste buds.

programme.desc: You don't have to sacrifice incredible food experiences in order to save a buck. Antonia Lofaso keeps her wallet full with irresistible Mexican munchies in Venice Beach, Calif., Duff Goldman saves a ton as he takes on the enormous Orca Platter.

programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fixin' It With Soos: Golf Cart
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel Pines are sent to spend the summer with their Great Uncle Sam.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Mabel's Guide to Art
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel Pines are sent to spend the summer with their Great Uncle Sam.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: TV Shorts #1
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel Pines are sent to spend the summer with their Great Uncle Sam.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: TV Shorts #2
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel Pines are sent to spend the summer with their Great Uncle Sam.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper and Mabel vs. the Future
programme.desc: Mabel decides to plan for her and Dipper's 13th birthday party. Meanwhile, Dipper ventures below the town to find its most shocking secret.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Last Mabelcorn
programme.desc: A new threat leads Mabel to venture into the enchanted realm of the unicorns. Meanwhile, Dipper learns an unexpected twist about the enigmatic Bill Cipher.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon
programme.desc: Trapped in the apocalypse and menaced by villains new and old, Dipper finds himself in a race against time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.desc: The Alola Pokémon League is down to the final moments of the final battle.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Meapless in Seattle

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Out to Launch

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne

programme.title: Kirby Buckets: All Hands on Dexter

programme.title: Kirby Buckets: Day of the Cat

programme.title: Kirby Buckets: The Rise and Fall of Fourth Period
programme.desc: Kirby antagonizes his teacher until he quits, so that the class doesn't have to do homework or have tests. Kirby becomes the leader of the class and creates a fun and chaotic classroom.

programme.title: Kirby Buckets: The Hurt Box
programme.desc: When Kirby's underground comic book that mocks Forest Hills' teachers is accidentally put in the school's suggestion box, Kirby, Fish and Eli devise a plan to steal it back before it's too late.

programme.title: Kirby Buckets: Get a Grip
programme.desc: Kirby, Eli, and Fish are working on their project for the science fair: creating the Ultimate High Five! But in preparation, Kirby breaks his hand.

programme.title: Kirby Buckets: The AV Kid
programme.desc: Kirby needs an embarrassing video of him losing a rap-battle to his mom taken down from the internet. Meanwhile, Dawn becomes obsessed with bubble wrap.
