programme.title: Martin: I Don't Have the Heart
programme.desc: Pam starts dating an older, wealthy man who eventually asks her to marry him.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: That's No Lady, That's My Cousin
programme.desc: Will is furious when Ashley transforms herself from an adolescent into a sexy babe.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Hilary Gets a Job
programme.desc: Hilary falls for an anchorman when she is hired as a weather person.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Mama's Baby, Carlton's Maybe
programme.desc: The Banks family is in an uproar when Carlton's ex-girlfriend presents them with a baby.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: P.S. I Love You
programme.desc: Philip entertains a senile judge and Will accepts expensive gifts from a rich classmate.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Here Comes the Judge
programme.desc: While campaigning to become a judge, Philip is faced with an embarrassing scandal.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Boyz in the Woods
programme.desc: Philip, Carlton and Will go on a camping trip, where they get trapped in a mountain cave.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: A Night at the Oprah
programme.desc: The Banks family appears on 'The Oprah Winfrey Show' and their bickering causes an uproar.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Asses to Ashes
programme.desc: Judge Carl Robertson defeats Philip in the election for State Superior Court Judge.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Get Out
programme.desc: Chaos reigns as Michael attempts to get his notoriously late family to a wedding on time.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Road Trip
programme.desc: Jay wants the family to learn more about American history, so she organizes a road trip.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Table for Too Many: Part 1
programme.desc: Michael and the family share a table with the annoying Parker family at a restaurant.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Table for Too Many: Part 2
programme.desc: Michael and the family share a table with the annoying Parker family at a restaurant.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Double Date
programme.desc: Claire is mortified when Michael and Janet come with her on her first date.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Failure to Communicate
programme.desc: Jay wants Michael to find a way for his parents to start speaking to each other again.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Pops Moves In
programme.desc: When Pops moves in with Shawn and Marlon, it's just like when they were kids, a little too much so.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Afro Cab
programme.desc: Shawn and Marlon start their own taxi company but soon find a few roadblocks to success.

programme.title: Movie: The Irresistible Blueberry Farm
programme.desc: A woman tries to fulfill her grandmother's dying wish by delivering a strange letter.

programme.title: Movie: Love on the Sidelines
programme.desc: A young woman falls into a job as a personal assistant to a star quarterback sidelined with injury.

programme.title: Movie: Love in Paradise
programme.desc: A Western movie star is forced to spend a weekend doing PR at a dude ranch. When his fans learn he's terrified of horses, he sets out to prove to them that he really does have what it takes to be a rancher.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Nothing to Fear But Fear Itself
programme.desc: Dorothy and Blanche accompany Rose to her aunt's funeral where she must give the eulogy.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Letter to Gorbachev
programme.desc: Rose writes to Soviet leader Gorbachev and receives an invitation to Moscow.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Strange Bedfellows
programme.desc: Blanche is exposed in the newspaper entering the home of a local married politician.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: Blanche makes a move at Ted, Stan's brother, the minute she learns he's a neurosurgeon. She is furious when she discovers the only woman Ted is apparently interested in is Dorothy. Meanwhile, Rose is suffering from insomnia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Visit From Little Sven
programme.desc: Rose's cousin Sven, arrives in Miami for a visit just prior to him being married by arrangement. However, when Blanche plays a trick on her latest beau, which involves Sven, the naive groom falls for her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Audit
programme.desc: Dorothy is stunned to learn that Stan's tax problems are her tax problems since Stan is being audited for a number of years when they were still married. Meanwhile, Blanche and Rose take a Spanish class, each for different reasons.

programme.title: Frasier: Kisses Sweeter Than Wine
programme.desc: Frasier's home needs minor repair work before he hosts a wine-tasting party for his club.

programme.title: Frasier: Sleeping With the Enemy
programme.desc: Frasier is elected spokesperson for the support staff to convince Kate Costas to give them their five percent raise. However, their antagonism towards each other soon develops into animal-like lust.

programme.title: Frasier: The Adventures of Bad Boy and Dirty Girl
programme.desc: Kate and Frasier have difficulty resisting temptation, but when they finally give in to their emotions, it is accidentally broadcast across Seattle and everyone wants to know the identity of 'Dirty Girl.'

programme.title: Frasier: The Last Time I Saw Maris
programme.desc: Maris goes missing for days and when she eventually returns, she asks Niles for a divorce.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier the Grinch
programme.desc: When the wrong Christmas gifts arrive for Frederick, Frasier is forced to go to the mall.

programme.title: Frasier: It's Hard to Say Goodbye If You Won't Leave
programme.desc: Frasier realizes the depth of his feelings for Kate, only to find out that she's moving the next day.

programme.title: Frasier: The Friend
programme.desc: Frasier's on-air appeal for friendship backfires when a boring man calls in. Frasier decides to meet Bob, but has trouble ending the friendship with his new wheelchair-bound friend when their tastes clearly conflict.

programme.title: Frasier: Come Lie With Me
programme.desc: Frasier lays down the law after finding out Joe spent the night in Daphne's room. Her reaction leaves the men paralyzed at the thought that Daphne may move out.

programme.title: Reba: Proud Reba
programme.desc: Reba is galled when Cheyenne and Van announce that they have applied for food stamps.

programme.title: Reba: Reba Works for Brock
programme.desc: Reba accepts a job reporting to Barbara Jean in Brock's dental office.

programme.title: Reba: It's Jake's Party, Cry If You Want To
programme.desc: Reba tries to refrain from making fun of Barbra Jean during Jake's birthday party.

programme.title: Reba: Safe Dating
programme.desc: Kyra is unsettled when her mother starts dating her boyfriend's father.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Three on a Couch
programme.desc: Constant bickering causes the girls to seek help from a therapist. This prompts the girls to reminisce about times they didn't get along. The therapist's conclusion: they should not live with one another.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Charlie's Buddy
programme.desc: A wartime buddy of Rose's late husband arrives in Miami to see Rose. However, he has more in mind than just a friendly visit. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Blanche haggle over the same dress to wear to a social event.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Artist
programme.desc: Dorothy, Blanche and Rose all agree to pose for the Hungarian sculptor Laszlo.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche's Little Girl
programme.desc: Blanche is thrilled by a visit from her daughter, Rebecca, an ex-model who has now gained quite a bit of weight. Also visiting with Rebecca is her oafish beau who constantly puts down her weight.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dorothy's New Friend
programme.desc: Dorothy befriends a novelist, Barbara Thorndyke, and she quickly infringes on Dorothy's relationship with Blanche and Rose, who think Barbara is nothing but a stuck up snob.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Grab That Dough
programme.desc: The girls fly to Los Angeles to appear on their favourite game show.

programme.title: Movie: A Country Wedding
programme.desc: A country western star returns to his hometown to sell his childhood home. Upon his arrival, he meets the girl he proposed to when he was eight. Faced with old feelings, he will discover what really matters in life.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Date Chronicles
programme.desc: Leigh runs the website Bad Date Chronicles, for people to anonymously post horrible date experiences.

programme.title: Movie: Destination Wedding
programme.desc: A woman has been painstakingly planning her sister's destination wedding for the longest time and as guests arrive on a beach paradise, she runs into her ex-boyfriend, who also happens to be the best man.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The antics of pre-pubescent school children Kyle, Cartman, Kenny and Stan, as they stumble through the deranged misadventures of their hometown, South Park.

programme.title: South Park: 1%
programme.desc: The 99% is ganging up on Cartman.

programme.title: The Office: The Coup
programme.desc: After Jan busts Michael for telling the employees they can watch movies instead of working on Mondays, Angela pushes Dwight to make a play for Michael's job. In the meantime, Pam surfs the internet and Jim plays video games.

programme.title: The Office: Grief Counseling
programme.desc: After learning that his old boss, the former regional manager, has died, Michael attempts to guide the Dunder Mifflin staff through their grief as he searches for the right way to honour the company man.

programme.title: The Office: Initiation
programme.desc: New full-time employee Ryan anxiously accompanies Dwight on his first sales call, but is taken aback by the odd series of challenges Dunder Miffin's top salesman puts him through along the way, including a sidetrip to the Schrute family beet farm.

programme.title: The Office: Diwali
programme.desc: Michael encourages the entire Scranton branch to support Kelly and attend a local celebration of Diwali, the Hindu Festival of Lights. As Ryan nervously faces Kelly's family at the event, Michael, his new girlfriend and the staff sample Indian cuisine.

programme.title: The Office: Branch Closing
programme.desc: When Jan tells Michael that the Scranton Branch will be shutting down, Michael strives to keep his staff's spirits up. Meanwhile, everyone privately begins to envision how their lives will change in the aftermath.

programme.title: The Office: The Merger
programme.desc: The Scranton branch and the Stamford branch of Dunder-Mifflin are merged, bringing old friends Jim and Pam back together after months apart. Michael and Dwight and the other employees deal with the changes.

programme.title: The Office: The Convict
programme.desc: Michael tries to be supportive after he learns that a new employee is an ex-convict.

programme.title: The Office: Back From Vacation
programme.desc: Still in vacation mode after his trip to Jamaica, Michael tries to hang on to his relaxed island vibe despite a wave of office hassles. It all becomes too much when an e-mail containing a racy vacation photo is forwarded around the office.

programme.title: The Office: Traveling Salesmen
programme.desc: On Andy's suggestion, Michael has staffers team up for sales calls, leading to some interesting, insightful moments in the field. Meanwhile, Dwight attempts to cover for Angela after she misses an important deadline.

programme.title: The Office: The Return
programme.desc: Oscar returns from his vacation with mixed emotions on whether or not he wants to be a part of the office. Meanwhile, Andy takes advantage of recent events to get closer to Michael. Jim turns to Karen and Pam for help to stage a prank on a new target.

programme.title: The Office: Ben Franklin
programme.desc: Acting on bad advice he received from his friend Todd Packer, Michael brings two 'adult' performers into the office in honour of Phyllis's wedding shower. Meanwhile, Karen confronts Pam about her past with Jim.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: Dec 2, 2020
programme.desc: Trevor and Roy Wood Jr. examine racial discrimination in housing, Brit Bennett discusses her novel 'The Vanishing Half,' and Michael J. Fox talks about his memoir 'No Time Like the Future.'

programme.title: The Office: Phyllis' Wedding
programme.desc: Phyllis regrets giving Michael an important job at her wedding after several embarrassing moments. Pam has flashbacks of her own wedding planning when she sees Phyllis's decorations. Meanwhile, Dwight is determined to catch wedding crashers.

programme.title: South Park: City Sushi
programme.desc: Butters is diagnosed with multiple personality disorder. Meanwhile, the owner of City Wok is outraged when the town's newest business opens up next door.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Finds Love
programme.desc: Cartman finally lets a special someone knows exactly how he feels about them.

programme.title: South Park: Fatbeard
programme.desc: Cartman's dream of living the life of a pirate will come true if he can just get to Somalia. When he doesn't find a crew of swashbucklers, he assumes command and leads the Somalian pirates to a glory of riches.

programme.title: South Park: Handicar
programme.desc: Timmy's successful new car service makes him a lot of enemies.

programme.desc: A notable county prosecutor is arrested for murder. As the case against him grows increasingly strong, Jane begin to doubt he did it. Meanwhile, Angela nominates herself to educate Maura on the interests of kids today.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Deny, Deny, Deny
programme.desc: The staff at Seattle Grace discover that doctors can be the most challenging patients.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Bring the Pain
programme.desc: Meredith and Dr. Shepherd have to use more than medicine when a young woman's traditionalist, religious father forbids her to have a life-saving operation. Meanwhile, George and Alex are forced to perform surgery under less than ideal conditions.

programme.title: The Closer: Standards and Practices
programme.desc: A Hollywood producer is murdered; an anonymous complaint for 'conduct unbecoming' is filed against Brenda.

programme.title: The Closer: Blue Blood
programme.desc: When an LA cop turns up dead, Brenda and her team race against the clock to get the truth. The relationship between Fritz and Brenda elevates to a whole new level.

programme.title: Major Crimes: There's No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Provenza faces possible permanent desk duty while the squad investigates the suspicious death of a loathsome ICE agent, which brings them into contact with the residents of an ancient apartment complex nicknamed La Shangri-la.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Backfire
programme.desc: A 19-year-old prostitute is brutally murdered. The squad rushes to reach a deal with the remorseless killer they believe is part of a larger criminal enterprise. Their efforts, however, do not sit well with the judge assigned to the case.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Poster Boy
programme.desc: The team works strategically to capture a spree killer who has put everyone on high alert. Trying to solve the case quickly, Raydor is torn between two seemingly right decisions, each of which comes with major consequences.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Gumshoe
programme.desc: The squad must work together with a private investigator when a clothing designer is found poisoned and his wife reported missing. Jane asks Maura to teach Angela to better handle her finances.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Kidnapping of Elizabeth Smart (Part 2)
programme.desc: Elizabeth Smart was kidnapped from her home, snatched from her bed at knifepoint by a man in the middle of the night. We look at the unbelievable nine month saga of the police investigation and family fight to keep hope alive.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Life and Death of Anna Nicole Smith
programme.desc: Uncovering how Anna Nicole Smith's lavish lifestyle may have contributed to her mysterious death.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Gianni Versace Murder
programme.desc: Celebrity designer Gianni Versace was fatally shot on the steps of his Miami Beach mansion in broad daylight. The mystery of his death is unraveled by those closest to him and his killer Andrew Cunanan.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High n' Dry
programme.desc: A unique application of forensic science gives investigators a different explanation for a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor
programme.desc: Three homicides on two continents looked like professional executions. Investigators on both sides of the Atlantic needed to find out if they were related.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a nine-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic’s vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to help them to also find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead police immediately focus their attention on her husband. Not until they examine cell phone records and a unique shoe print do they realize the real killer has been a bit too close for comfort the entire time.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: A married couple was found shot to death in their suburban home. Investigators thought they had pin-pointed the killer and his motive until trash revealed the shocking truth and the true killer's identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High n' Dry
programme.desc: A unique application of forensic science gives investigators a different explanation for a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor
programme.desc: Three homicides on two continents looked like professional executions. Investigators on both sides of the Atlantic needed to find out if they were related.

programme.desc: Newlyweds are murdered in a small town in Illinois and a local barfly is quickly sent to death row for the crime.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Family Lies
programme.desc: After a family of six is found brutally murdered in a rural Texas town, a perpetrator confesses to the crime.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murder in Miami

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Racer vs. Racer: Moving On Up

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Racer vs. Racer: Chief of Mistakes
programme.desc: Street racing's top guns relive some of their toughest moments, including a costly mistake that threatened to derail Chief in the last list race of the season.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Racer vs. Racer: Throwing Wrenches
programme.desc: The biggest names in street racing come together to share their memories including an old-school Cash Days race between OKC and Texas.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Racer vs. Racer: Tuner's Game
programme.desc: The baddest of the bad in street racing share their thoughts on competition, engines, cars and more including a night of Cash Days racing where 405 racers fought to knock out the remaining racers from Texas.

programme.title: Street Outlaws
programme.desc: A look at underground street racing in America.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: To the Finish Line
programme.desc: The racing continues as every runway, every tight race and every crash is relived in one action-packed hour. There's also a sneak peek at the upcoming season of Street Outlaws back in Oklahoma City.

programme.title: Street Outlaws
programme.desc: A look at underground street racing in America.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: To the Finish Line
programme.desc: The racing continues as every runway, every tight race and every crash is relived in one action-packed hour. There's also a sneak peek at the upcoming season of Street Outlaws back in Oklahoma City.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: House of Cards
programme.desc: Glenn doubles down on his million-dollar idea with a bold new plan to expand the business. But in the midst of making deals, Glenn's confronted with the prospect of losing all of his start-up funds, leaving him fighting to keep the dream alive.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: No Pain, No Gain
programme.desc: With his team depending on him, Glenn loses a critical deal and is sent spinning. As the pressure mounts, the underdogs rally to flip a house that could save the business and change their lives forever.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Exposed
programme.desc: The Underdog BBQ team races to prepare for their opening day, but when Glenn accidentally reveals his true identity to a team member, it puts the entire business and the bet in jeopardy.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Final Reckoning
programme.desc: Glenn's 90 days are up and it's time to find out if his business is worth a million dollars. But first, Glenn reveals his true identity to his team as well as what each one of them has earned for their part of Underdog BBQ.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Three Million Dollar Bet
programme.desc: With just $100 in their pockets, three business titans are dropped in unfamiliar cities, stripped of their names, money, and contacts and given a simple challenge: build a $1 million business in just 90 days.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Comeback City: Big Pivot, Big Profit
programme.desc: Self-made billionaire Glenn Stearns reveals what it takes to save a struggling business when he's called on to rescue Tipsy Bean, an Erie coffee shop with huge potential but suffering from a fatal flaw.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: American Whiskey
programme.desc: Heritage grains meet charred oak as three amateur distillers compete to make the best American Whiskey. Judged by Mark, Digger and Tim, they'll go head to head in a series of challenges to determine who has what it takes to be Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Holiday Showdown
programme.desc: In the spirit of Christmas and a new season of Master Distiller, Tickle challenges fellow moonshiners Josh, Mike and Daniel to compete to make the tastiest Christmas spirits. Mark, Digger, and Tim judge who wins a special backwoods prize.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Moonshine of Mexico
programme.desc: Mark, Digger and Tim judge as top amateur distillers from both sides of the law compete to make mezcal, the moonshine of Mexico. Using agave mash, regional recipes and even meat, only one competitor will earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: High Proof Cherry Bounce
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete to make a 300-year-old spirit called Cherry Bounce, a favorite drink of George Washington, nearly lost to time. Josh Owens, whose family kept the recipe alive for generations in the backwoods, joins as guest judge.

programme.title: My Legs Won't Stop Growing
programme.desc: Through the lives of three inspirational young women this documentary explores a number of conditions that cause the lower limbs to grow or swell excessively.

programme.title: Obese and Expecting
programme.desc: Four moms-to-be who are morbidly obese challenge the odds on their journey to motherhood.

programme.title: Extraordinary People: My Pregnant Husband
programme.desc: Ari and Caitlin and Myles and Precious experience the joy of a transgender pregnancy when Ari and Myles, the men in their relationships, become pregnant. The couples must conquer unique obstacles when the person carrying and birthing their child is a man.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Life-Altering News
programme.desc: While Amy reaps the benefits of weight-loss surgery, her sister Tammy worries that she gained weight during quarantine. A visit to urgent care gives Amy life-changing news. Tammy's family confronts her over her health.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Big Pop on Campus
programme.desc: Dr. Lee is tasked with helping Reginald remove a large growth on his head. Then, Che'RE has a prominent bump on her place and Juan has boils on the back of his neck.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Cystic River
programme.desc: Dennis has several giant growths on the back of his head. Juan has a rare condition he hopes Dr. Lee will understand. Natalie searches for answers as to why her body is covered in hundreds of mysterious dark bumps.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Tippin' the Scales
programme.desc: The Slatons head back to Atlanta to see Dr. Procter. Amy is worried about dropping the news that she got pregnant so soon after surgery, against doctor's orders. Tammy returns knowing she's gained all the weight back.

programme.title: Unpolished: Touched Up: Catch Up Special
programme.desc: Long Island nail artist Lexi Martone shares everything that happened with her family and their salon last season. From wild nail requests to a marriage proposal and the resurfacing of an explosive family secret, it was quite a year for the Martones.

programme.desc: Long Island nail artist Lexi Martone shares everything that happened with her family and their salon last season. From wild nail requests to a marriage proposal and the resurfacing of an explosive family secret, it was quite a year for the Martones.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Big Girl, Little Bus
programme.desc: Whitney invites Buddy on the road. The BGDC Pittsburgh class is overbooked in a cramped venue, jeopardizing the tour. Buddy's back pain flares up, threatening his sobriety. After a rough night, Buddy is missing and Whitney is forced to leave him behind.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Buddy's New Girl
programme.desc: Buddy goes missing in Columbus and Whitney threatens to cancel class. With the biggest city on the BGDC tour still looming, Whitney suspects sabotage when Todd messes up the choreography. Whitney is conflicted over meeting Buddy's new girlfriend.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Second Time Around
programme.desc: Caitlin is having a military wedding after eloping; Lee is renewing her vows.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Love the Skin I'm In
programme.desc: Body conscious Kristyn has been avoiding wedding dress shopping for over a year. Sherri has lost 35 pounds but is still nervous about fitting into her body-hugging gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Daddy-Daughter Dilemma
programme.desc: Caitlin has her fitting now that her father is healthy enough to attend.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: It's Just Money
programme.desc: With no budget in mind, Kandice comes from Texas to find a blingy dress for her vow renewal ceremony.

programme.title: Unexpected: Invitation to the Gender Reveal
programme.desc: Jessica worries Reanna may be going into early labor. Tyra is furious that Julie's internet boyfriend has moved in. Myrka invites her mom to her gender reveal party. Jenna refuses to move her pet rabbit's cage to make room for a new crib.

programme.title: Unexpected: Catching Up With Hailey 1
programme.desc: Tiarra hears the Matthew drama when she gets together with Hailey. Taron threatens to take Reanna to court to see his baby. Myrka and Ethan prepare for an extravagant gender reveal party. Jenna's dad refuses to let her mom be a part of the baby shower.

programme.title: My Teen Is Pregnant and So Am I: Do the Right Thing
programme.desc: Two families welcome a new child into their fold. Two defiant boyfriends return, while another slips away.

programme.title: My Teen Is Pregnant and So Am I: Easier Said Than Done
programme.desc: The limits of motherhood are tested when Nicole has a c-section and Mariah refuses to help because of AJ. Kim goes through a painful labour and delivery. Chaé learns that her baby may have a heart condition.

programme.title: Unpolished: Meet the Martones
programme.desc: The Martones are a loud, fun-loving Italian family from Long Island. Sisters Lexi, a talented nail artist, and Bria, a hair colourist/makeup artist, run Salon Martone while juggling family dynamics, over the top clients, and their own relationships.

programme.title: Unpolished: All That Glitters
programme.desc: Bria's engagement dreams with Matthew turn into a nightmare at her party. Then, she has to collaborate with Lexi on an important client who has a unique request for a music video. Lexi's feelings about Bria's fiancé may drive them apart.

programme.title: Unpolished: Through Thick and Thin
programme.desc: An upcoming surgery bring the family together in a time of turmoil. Lexi's client has an interesting request for a portrait of her dead pet. Then, the Martone women head into the big city for a nail polish event where Lexi is an honoured guest.

programme.title: Unpolished: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: The Martone ladies make a splash while shopping for Bria's wedding dress. At the salon, the sisters collaborate on a client who wants to be transformed into an alien goddess. Later, Lexi is pushed to reveal her real issues with Bria's fiancé.

programme.title: Movie: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift

programme.title: Weird Earth: Crop Circles and Second Suns
programme.desc: Does the Virgin Mary appear in a dust cloud as a landslide narrowly misses her church? How can a second sun suddenly appear over a city? And does a farmer's footage finally solve the riddle of mysterious crop circles?

programme.title: Weird Earth: Breathing Forests and Fizzing Fireballs
programme.desc: What is the huge fizzing fireball filmed crashing through a farmer's field? Why does a forest seem to be breathing? And a mysterious horizontal cloud puzzles Japanese airplane passengers.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Tornadoes at Midnight
programme.desc: Dallas Residents are caught off guard when a Monster tornado spins out of the darkness, Hamburg, NY is thrown into an eerie and icy gloom when hit by a powerful, lake effect snowstorm.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Music City Tornado
programme.desc: A nighttime supercell spawns a terrifying tornado in Nashville trapping a crane operator hundreds of feet above the city, two ice climbers take an extreme risk for the ultimate reward, and the weather turns a vacation dream on the beautiful resort island.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: The Wrath of Weather
programme.desc: A sleeping volcano erupts and sends hundreds running for their lives, more than a dozen elementary school students are the unknowing targets of a violent microburst, and window washing is always risky.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather: Nowhere to Hide
programme.desc: Hurricane Michael rips across the Florida panhandle, trapping a storm chaser and leaving him nowhere to hide. The UK coast guard battles gale force winds to rescue fishermen stranded on the hull of their capsized trawler in rough seas.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather: Fearsome Flooding
programme.desc: Queensland Australia is shaken by the most devastating flood in its history, forcing residents to wade to safety through crocodile-infested waters. In Kansas in the US, two storm chasers track a terrifying twister as it tears up the neighborhood.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather: Tornado Terror
programme.desc: A twister outbreak takes over Texas, leaving a storm chaser trapped, with nowhere to run. In Florida, dangerous rip tides drag swimmers out to sea, prompting a daring rescue mission by fellow beachgoers.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Trapped in a Blizzard
programme.desc: The Kim family take a wrong turn and find themselves stuck in snow on a logging road. With no knowledge about how survive the cold and mountains the Kim's get desperate. After 3 days they run out of food, gas and hopes of another car coming to save them.

programme.desc: Go behind the scenes as Joe, Sal, Q and Murr ham it up behind the counter of a famous NYC deli. Then, tonight’s loser wishes Bingo wasn’t his name-o in a humiliating and cringe-worthy punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Great Escape
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes as the guys go off-key while posing as music instructors. Plus, tonight’s big loser lacks the magic touch in a show-stopping punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: The guys head to the Lone Star State in a special episode that proves even embarrassment is bigger in Texas. And it's a real drag for tonight's loser at what is definitely his first rodeo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Puncture Perfect
programme.desc: The guys have to complete a series of bizarre tasks at a video game store. Plus, tonight's punishment cuts deep for the big loser in a painful test of friendship.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hopeless and Changeless
programme.desc: The guys head to the park asking strangers to agree with their bizarre points of view. Plus, Murr finds himself in a harrowing race to the finish at the track, learn how he barely escaped with his life via golf cart.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Coward
programme.desc: The guys show who's boss at a fast food joint and whisper sweet nothings at a grocery store. Then, the big loser helps a cow in labor, and almost buys the farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Food Flattener

programme.desc: Julie gets frustrated when the family use Chloe's birthday as a reason to compete against each other. Nanny Faye gets more than she bargained for when Todd insists on being her trainer.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd and Pony Show
programme.desc: Todd becomes Faye's assistant after finding out that she's been making Julie to run all of her errands. Meanwhile, Savannah gets over-excited when Chloe shows an interest in horseback riding.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: A Date with Destiny
programme.desc: A newly single Chase gets caught off guard when his family sets him up on a double blind date. Meanwhile, Todd struggles with how to handle Grayson's latest homework assignment.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: Bursting the Quarantine Bubble
programme.desc: With the stay-at-home order finally lifted, the divas of Dallas are ready to make the most of their quarantine bubble, as safely as possible. Kameron gets a new dog and hosts a socially distanced garage sale.

programme.title: Watch What Happens Live
programme.desc: Andy welcomes Meghan McCain and S.E. Cupp.

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: Trash Talk
programme.desc: Day two of the girls trip in Mexico kicks off with a polo match, a talking horse, cartwheels and a lot of tequila but Stephanie finds herself having a hard time finding the fun. Kameron and Brandi find themselves at odds over LeeAnne's behavior.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: Worst Vacation Ever
programme.desc: On the third day of the girls trip to Mexico, Stephanie confides in Kary about feeling overwhelmed by Kameron's harsh comment to Brandi. Brandi and Kameron meet up beachside to discuss their issues.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: Cirque D'Lingerie
programme.desc: Upon returning back from their trip to Mexico, D'Andra seeks business advice from Travis. Kameron feels like a third wheel when it comes to the bond between her husband and daughter. LeeAnne kicks off the first of several pre-wedding celebrations.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: Ghost Busted
programme.desc: Brandi continues to attempt to bond with her daughter Brooklyn, while Stephanie and Kameron try to work things out after their dust-up at LeeAnne's lingerie shower. Kary confronts LeeAnne about D'Andra.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: Guess Who's Coming to Happy Hour?
programme.desc: A death in the family has Brandi hosting a funeral for a beloved Redmond, while Mama Dee refuses to help D'Andra with the failing family business. Kameron spins in circles when two of the ladies back out of her couples shower for LeeAnne.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: A Mother of a Day
programme.desc: Kary decides to attend LeeAnne's wedding, despite their fractured friendship. While Brandi continues to clash with her daughter Brooklyn, she receives shocking news about another baby up for adoption.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: My Big Fat Dallas Wedding
programme.desc: LeeAnne and Rich finally tie the knot, and her wedding reception leaves everyone hungry for more. Brandi tries to convince Bryan to say 'I do' to adopting Bruin's sibling. Stephanie invites the women to join her in Thailand.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: My Life on the Dee List
programme.desc: Kameron tries to impress her daughter with a bow and arrow, while Kary has her first photoshoot for her jewelry line. Stephanie throws husband Travis a mid-life crisis themed 50th birthday party. Things get crazy when Mama Dee appears to crash the party.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: Babes in Thailand
programme.desc: The Dallas ladies' first day of the trip is jam-packed as they explore all Thailand has to offer. But it's not all fun and leisure, LeeAnne and Kary remain at odds. Then, D' Andra shows up to dinner wearing LeeAnne's L'Infinity Dress as a joke.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: One Fight in Bangkok

programme.title: UFO Files: UFOs of the 70's
programme.desc: The 1970s were one of the most active periods of UFO sightings. The most famous sightings of the decade are recalled and up-to-date information on the closest of encounters is provided.

programme.title: UFO Files: Alien Encounters
programme.desc: There is recorded proof of over 3,000 UFO landings, collisions, or flyovers.

programme.title: UFOs: Secret Alien Technology
programme.desc: Many wonder about the origins of the innovative technology currently pushing mankind into the future. We examine the possibility that the greatest inventions of the 20th century are the products of revere-engineered alien technology.

programme.title: UFOs: Secret Missions Exposed
programme.desc: An investigation into if our government has been hiding top-secret space missions involving the Moon and Mars and whether something dangerous is being covered up.

programme.title: UFOs: The White House Files
programme.desc: There has been a legacy of secrecy and controversy surrounding extraterrestrials, and several presidents are rumoured to have had personal encounters. It may be possible that these leaders are hiding the truth from the public.

programme.title: UFOs: Top Secret Alien Files
programme.desc: Through dramatic re-enactments of actual UFO classified files and expert interviews, this special explores the lengths that people on the front lines will go to keep civilians safe from extraterrestrial encounters.

programme.title: UFO Conspiracy: Hunt for the Truth
programme.desc: In the 70 years since the famed Roswell UFO crash, there is a long history of allegations involving alien phenomena and their supposed government cover-ups.

programme.desc: To prove himself worthy of his fiancee, a dancer tries to make it big, only to fall for his dancing partner.

programme.title: Movie: Citizen Kane
programme.desc: When a newspaper tycoon dies, a reporter seeks to investigate his life and the meaning of his last dying word.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer

programme.title: Bunk'd: Bungle in the Jungle

programme.title: Bunk'd: Gruel and Unusual Punishment
programme.desc: The kids explore the booths at Camp Kikiwaka’s Olde Moose Rump Days. They find an old wooden box from Zuri’s booth and suddenly find themselves in the 1600s.

programme.title: Jessie: Karate Kid-tastrophe
programme.desc: Emma rebels with loud music, adult clothes, and a bad attitude. She ends up getting suspended from school and running away. Jessie learns her whereabouts and manages to get Emma to open up about what's bugging her.

programme.title: Jessie: Dance, Dance Resolution
programme.desc: It's school dance time, and the Ross family pulls out all the stops to score dates. Meanwhile, Jessie helps Bertram prepare for his first solo at the Metropolitan Opera.

programme.title: Jessie: Take the A-Train ... I Think?
programme.desc: To the kids' dismay, Jessie has everyone take the subway to the cultural fair at Emma's school. Meanwhile, Bertram and Ravi look for a pesky spider that has made its home in the apartment.

programme.title: Jessie: Star Wars
programme.desc: Jessie helps host teen movie star Jordan Taylor who is staying at the Ross' house.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: Crybaby Duran

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: Olivia Gone Wild

programme.desc: While Booker and Tess team up to plan their sixth grade dance, Nia worries her dancing skills aren't good enough for the big event. Meanwhile, Raven starts to question if she's being a good mom and goes overboard trying to volunteer for the kids' school.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Vending the Rules

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Style/ I, Farmbot

programme.desc: It's Renaissance week, so Lou assigns roles for each camper to play. Finn is declared the king and gets to run the camp for a week, but he ultimately makes the camp miserable.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: I Know What You Did Last Sleepover
programme.desc: Sydney and Olive are excited for their weeklong sleepover. Young Max and Leo get in a fight about Max constantly forgetting his job responsibilities at the arcade.

programme.title: Jessie: Creepy Connie's Curtain Call
programme.desc: Jessie writes a play to be produced at the kids' school, but to Luke's shock, she's cast Creepy Connie as his love interest. Meanwhile, Zuri job-shadows Bertram for her school report.

programme.title: Jessie: We Are So Grounded
programme.desc: Jessie, Bertram and the kids head to Bali for a family vacation, but when their private jet starts to fail, Jessie takes control of the cockpit and makes an emergency landing on a tropical island.

programme.title: Raven's Home: How I Met Your Mentor
programme.desc: Nia is matched with a high school mentor, whose personality, values and sense of style couldn't be more different.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Smoky Flow
programme.desc: The kids form a band called the Chi-Lectives and film a video in Tess’ apartment. When things get out of hand with a smoke machine, Raven discovers they were home alone.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Ridgewood-A-Rooney
programme.desc: When Parker gets bumped up a few grades, he starts attending high school with Liv, Maddie and Joey! The older siblings now have to deal with him being good at everything.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Coach-A-Rooney
programme.desc: A new coach arrives to take charge of the girls' basketball team and immediately butts heads with Maddie. Meanwhile, when Liv agrees to help Parker with his art project, her date with Holden takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Campers & Complications
programme.desc: When Ally's old summer camp friend Elliott comes to town to pay a visit, he and Ally spend a lot of time catching up and reminiscing about the past. Though Austin is now dating Kira, he suddenly finds himself jealous of Ally's friendship with Elliott.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Chapters & Choices
programme.desc: When Ally's mom comes home to host a book release party, Ally works up the courage to finally conquer her stage fright and performs a duet with Austin at the event.

programme.title: Jessie: Break-Up and Shape-Up

programme.title: Jessie: Diary of a Mad Newswoman

programme.desc: Cricket and Remy play a game of 'H-O-R-S-E'; Cricket tries to make his dad believe in aliens to avoid punishment.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Feast

programme.title: Sofia the First: The Enchanted Feast

programme.title: Sofia the First: The Flying Crown

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: How ARF Got His Bark Back / Sir Bob
programme.desc: When Bob can't fix ARF's voice box, Bingo and Rolly race to find an inventor. Bob's favorite knight goes missing at a jousting event, plunging the Pugs on a mission to find him!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Smiley-est Shark/ The Super Duper Brother
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Nursery Schooling / Bunny Bunanza
programme.desc: After K.C. gets sick, Pip and Freddy watch the babies in the Nursery for her. Then, when delivery batches of bunnies get mixed up, the Junior Fliers must figure out which bunny is which.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Close Encounters of a Pug Kind/ History Mystery
programme.desc: When Bob wants to meet someone from space, the pugs go to a gathering of UFO enthusiasts. When the pups find a doggie toy that isn't theirs, they go on a mission to find its owner.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Pug-scape/ Luck of the Pug-ish
programme.desc: After Hissy gets a 'time out' for the day, Bingo and Rolly try to break her out of her punishment. To change Bob's fortune, the pugs travel to Ireland to bring home some good luck.

programme.title: Bluey: The Sleepover / Hide and Seek / Camping
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo's cousin Muffin shows up for a sleepover; Bluey plays a game of hide and seek with Bingo; Bluey goes camping and meets Jean-Luc.

programme.desc: Bluey and her friends want to play a game of 'Shops'; Bluey and her family take a trip to the pool; The family plays with hand puppets.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Reflekdoll

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Head Over Wheels

programme.title: Bunk'd: It's a Blast!
programme.desc: The campers participate in a model rocket competition with three rounds: altitude, speed, and safety.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Up, Up, and Away

programme.title: U.S. House of Representatives

programme.title: NCIS: Kill Ari, Part 1
programme.desc: While the NCIS team deals with Kate's death, Gibbs's determination to finally put an end to Ari's reign of terror mounts. Though he has no concrete evidence that the sniper was Ari, Gibbs is haunted by the thought that the bullet was meant for him.

programme.title: NCIS: Kill Ari, Part 1
programme.desc: While the NCIS team deals with Kate's death, Gibbs's determination to finally put an end to Ari's reign of terror mounts. Though he has no concrete evidence that the sniper was Ari, Gibbs is haunted by the thought that the bullet was meant for him.

programme.title: NCIS: Silver War
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team are called in when a deceased man is found encased in a Civil War tomb.

programme.title: NCIS: Light Sleeper
programme.desc: When the wives of two marines are murdered, Gibbs and the team are called in to investigate. Gibbs and the team fear the murders are racially motivated, and they work together to find the killer and protect the woman they fear is the next target.

programme.title: NCIS: Head Case
programme.desc: The NCIS team makes a gruesome discovery, the severed head of a marine, when they bust a stolen car ring run by marines. The team looks for clues that will lead them to the rest of the marine's body and the person responsible for the crime.

programme.title: NCIS: Ravenous
programme.desc: Teens on a nature hike discover marine dog tags in a national forest. As the team investigates, they discover that past accidents in the park seem to be linked to a possible serial killer who is using the park as a location to torture and kill women.

programme.title: NCIS: Bloodbath
programme.desc: The team investigates an off-base navy lodge for visiting families after a room is found splattered with blood and human tissue. Ducky discovers that the remains are of three people and have been expertly dissected, probably by a doctor.

programme.title: NCIS: Suspicion
programme.desc: The team investigates when a high-level marine intelligence officer is found murdered in a small town motel room. The team discovers evidence of a potential terrorist cell, but Gibbs is wary since small town biases seemed to sway the first investigation.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Skin Deep
programme.desc: The team heads to the beach to question the possible link between a surfer, an Internet video and a dead naval tech scientist. Meanwhile, as Callen and Hanna investigate the victim's intelligence connections, Deeks and Kensi go catch some waves.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Collateral
programme.desc: The team questions the motive behind the murder of a retired CIA agent turned millionaire and in the process also questions what Hetty knows about the case.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: The Gold Standard
programme.desc: The team investigates the strange and brazen heist executed by gunmen in costumes that could directly impact the U.S. economy. Meanwhile, as Deeks testifies on a case, Granger insists on partnering up with a very reluctant Kensi.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Senseless
programme.desc: Four African-American college freshmen that left the ghetto lifestyle to make something of their lives are shot on a playground in a racially charged case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Purgatory
programme.desc: Goren is in purgatory waiting to see if he can be reinstated and to prove himself, he goes undercover to try to catch a major drug dealer.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Contract
programme.desc: A gossip columnist is killed and a wide range of people are suspects.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Imposter Injustice
programme.desc: After a beloved family man is murdered in a small, Midwest town, cops try to find his missing wife before she meets the same fate. When another homicide occurs, despite a 911 tip with the killer's location, it seems justice may never be served.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Murder Becomes Personal
programme.desc: When Pamela Vitale is found brutally murdered in her home on a California mountainside, detectives are led down a dark path to a killer hiding in plain sight. But even a sentence of life without parole can't guarantee this killer won't walk free.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Mansion Massacre
programme.desc: When a quadruple homicide is discovered in the ashes of a D.C. mansion fire, a small piece of evidence points to a monster with a grudge, a violent past, and a long rap sheet. A nationwide manhunt ensues to finally bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Taste for Blood
programme.desc: When North Dakota State Troopers arrive at a fatal car crash, the gory scene leaves them questioning whether it was by accident or intentional. After interviewing the lone survivor, a terrifying history of violence and death is uncovered.

programme.title: License to Kill: A Match Made in Hell
programme.desc: In order to solidify the secret bond keeping them together, two aids working at a nursing home create a twisted murderous game involving the Alzheimer's patients they care for.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Charles Cullen
programme.desc: Nurse Charles Cullen is one of America's most prolific serial killers. Police say he may have murdered up to 400 victims, Cullen claimed he acted mercifully to end their pain. An in-depth look into the case reveals the truth behind his motives.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Closing Night
programme.desc: A military veteran is missing and young student is murdered in what appears to be a crime of passion. But the discovery of a secret payout leads police on a wild chase.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Deadly Fetish
programme.desc: The wife of a Marine, a pregnant dominatrix and a sex slave cross paths in a twisted tale of kidnapping, lies, and murder.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Hillside Homicide
programme.desc: After a life of hard work, one happy retiree is looking forward to easy peaceful days ahead. But a lover's quarrel and a quick money scheme lead to murder. Hollywood is stunned when a body is found under its most famous landmark.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Menage-a-Murder
programme.desc: What started as a perfect marriage evolves into a questionable threesome. Soon one of them winds up dead, but the killer who rocked this trio is no one that investigators saw coming.

programme.title: Movie: The Hangover
programme.desc: Two days before his wedding, three friends decide to take a groom to Las Vegas. Since the bride-to-be doesn't approve of bachelor parties, the men lie to her about their trip. After a wild night of partying, the guys wake up to find the groom missing.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Goo Goo Gai Pan

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Seven Beer Snitch

programme.title: The Simpsons: Future-Drama

programme.title: The Simpsons: Don't Fear the Roofer

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Heartbroke Kid
programme.desc: Bart's diet of processed foods leads to a massive weight gain and health issues.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Star Is Torn
programme.desc: Lisa agrees to participate in a Krusty-sponsored Li'l Starmaker competition.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Thank God It's Doomsday

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Thunder Gun Express
programme.desc: The gang will do whatever it takes to see the hottest action movie of the summer, 'Thunder Gun Express,' before it leaves the theatres.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The High School Reunion
programme.desc: The gang attends their high school reunion with a lot to prove. Old friends are met and new foes are made as the gang trips down memory lane.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The High School Reunion
programme.desc: In the conclusion of this two-part episode the gang devises a new plan at their high school reunion to make sure their tarnished high school images will now sparkle and shine.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Pop-Pop: The Final Solution
programme.desc: Dennis and Dee's ailing grandfather Pop-Pop is wasting away in the hospital, and they have to decide whether or not to pull the plug. But things get complicated when The Gang learns of Pop-Pop's history as a Nazi.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Ice Highway
programme.desc: With dark winter just around the corner, Alaskans continue preparing for the winter months. In Noorvik, Chip builds a freight sled for winter travel. A blizzard strands Sue in Fairbanks and she must brave a notoriously dangerous road to get home to Kavik.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Darkness Falls
programme.desc: Andy maintains the snow covered trails in Eagle. In Kavik, Sue fixes her generator in order to have electricity throughout winter. The Hailstones build a new teepee for their growing family and Erik takes his wife hunting for animal hides.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Alone in the Dark
programme.desc: In Eagle, Andy maintains the snow-covered trails. In Kavik, Sue fixes her generator. In Noorvik, the Hailstones build a new teepee to shelter their growing family for upcoming hunts. In Wiseman, Eric takes his wife hunting for animal hides.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: No Easy Out

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Bent and Broken
programme.desc: Andy constructs snares to maintain his food supply. Erik and Martha cut up their last moose quarter. Chip and Agnes go caribou hunting. And Sue clears her runway for a plane to deliver a new snow machine.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: The Crash
programme.desc: As winter fades and signs of spring emerge, the Alaskans begin to store supplies for the coming months.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Aftermath

programme.title: Life Below Zero: The Resurrection
programme.desc: As winter surrenders to spring, Alaskans take advantage of the Thaw’s longer days and warming temperatures.
