programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar Conquers London
programme.desc: Cesar is back in the United Kingdom for another episode of Dog Whisperer, but it isn't all garden parties and high tea.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bad Dogs of Comedy
programme.desc: Cesar helps a group of hilarious comedians face their toughest critics: their own pets. Featured funny guys include Skyler Stone, Ralphie May, Lahna Turner and Paul Rodriguez.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bull-Whipped
programme.desc: Cesar travels to Santa Barbara to meet Hugo, a 3-year-old bulldog with a mean streak. After a full day with him, Cesar realizes there is no quick fix for Hugo's aggression so it's off to rehab at Cesar's Dog Psychology Center.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Pack Leaders in Training
programme.desc: Cesar has always believed that kids are more receptive to his training methods and often succeed in getting a dog to behave faster than most adults can.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Jersey Shore Dogs
programme.desc: The Jersey Shore is in for a dose of discipline when Cesar heads for the boardwalk to help three families deal with their out of control dogs' situations.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Rhino-mite!
programme.desc: There are surprising results when a white rhino gets an ultrasound.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Kangaroo-mance
programme.desc: Young kangaroo Fergus gets a gut check in the love department.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Bringing Up Baby!
programme.desc: The keepers do early morning breakfast rounds at the Heart of Africa exhibit.

programme.title: World's Deadliest: Pack Hunters
programme.desc: Deadly predators in the animal kingdom owe their success to hunting in groups.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Earth's Death Orbit
programme.desc: Earth's journey through the universe is a perilous one. New discoveries reveal that our planet is heading toward a mysterious area of the cosmos that could eject us out of the Milky Way and into oblivion.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Finding the New Earth
programme.desc: New discoveries have revealed thousands of exoplanets beyond our solar system, and some resemble earth enough that one could be a new home for humanity. But even with cutting-edge technology, finding the perfect one is the scientific challenge of the age.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Relic of Mystery
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare teams up with a Midwestern history enthusiast to investigate a mysterious relic that could be evidence of Viking settlement in America centuries before Columbus, but some think it's a hoax.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Curses and Ghosts
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard investigate the man accused of forging evidence of Vikings in America, testing a crucial piece of evidence with DNA analysis: an ancient skull that may have alien origins.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret Ruins of the Forgotten
programme.desc: A deserted amusement park and ruins of a top-secret military doomsday bunker hold secrets to a strange and forgotten past; experts investigate these remarkable feats of engineering to uncover how they were constructed and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Swamp of Despair
programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana swamp, the ruins of a massive industrial operation suggest that something evil once happened here, and new discoveries at this eerie site reveal what these abandoned buildings were for and why they were deserted.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: A strange bunker near the Kennedy Space Center once served a top-secret military function should doomsday ever come to the Sunshine State. Experts use declassified intel to reveal the sinister purpose of this forbidding facility and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Ghost Park
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Valentich/ Texas Blue Dogs
programme.desc: A pilot and his light aircraft disappear from the skies above southern Australia in 1978. In Texas, blue-eyed and hunch backed creatures have mutilated livestock since 2004.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Voodoo Zombies/ Life After Death
programme.desc: Voodoo Zombies explores claims of the existence of zombies in Haiti. In Life After Death patients experience strange effects after life saving transplant operations.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Spontaneous Human Combustion and Mexican Pilot UFO
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, February 2013, a man is found completely incinerated to a pile of ashes in his own home. Pilot Carlos de los Santos was en route to Mexico City Airport when he was suddenly surrounded by three UFOs in the sky.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Omens of the Mothman
programme.desc: Joaquin V Gonzalez is a small town in northern Argentina. Two strange events make this a UFO hot spot. In 2009 a strange creature is seen in West Virginia and more than 10,000 people suffer from a strange disease.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Are Aliens Attacking Our Nuclear Arsenal?
programme.desc: Across the globe, senior military personnel witness UFOs above nuclear weapons bases and in some cases UFOs are reported to shut down nuclear missiles.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Conspiracy in the Buried City
programme.desc: Residents devised an ingenious trick to keep the location of buried ancient city hidden five stories underground secret from invaders; experts reveal what it was, and using the latest tech, they reveal the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: The Renegade's Lair
programme.desc: A strange underground system known as the Black Cave is connected to a fairytale castle and was home to an infamous nobleman on the run from the law; today, experts investigate the secrets he left here to discover new parts of this mysterious network.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Murder in Macks Creek
programme.desc: Trudy Darby is murdered in Mack's Creek, MO. When two more local women go missing police fear a serial killer. Silence reigns over the town until a call out of the blue reveals the killers are uncomfortably close to home.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Silver Peak's Secret
programme.desc: Charlie Kinkel goes missing in a remote Nevada mining town. His wife Trayce investigates but is shunned by locals. When a body is discovered, detectives break down the silence to reveal Charlie's murder was a tragic case of misplaced suspicion.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: A Killing in Kendrick
programme.desc: Donna Fontaine and her boyfriend Fred Palahniuk are found shot dead in a burning building in remote Kendrick, Idaho. A conspiracy of silence protects the killer until his lovers crack and confess the damning evidence needed to convict him.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: Patricia Mills is killed in a house fire in Goliad, Texas. Her sister, suspicious the fire is deliberate, investigates. It takes 10 years to break the silence but the surprising culprit is finally trapped: the fire was arson, Patricia was murdered.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Reuschel vs. Reuschel
programme.desc: A wealthy Florida businessman is arrested after a violent confrontation with his wife, and his daughter's sumptuous wedding may have inspired his murderous rage.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: Speaking for the Dead
programme.desc: In 'the city too busy to hate,' investigators at Atlanta Homicide have three murders on their hands after a woman is gunned down and two teens are shot in their car.

programme.title: Murder in the Chat Room
programme.desc: After her marriage fails, 28-year-old Samantha decides to give online dating a try. Just a few months later, police find her brutally murdered and must track her online footprint through different chat rooms to unmask her killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: A Candy Run
programme.desc: A family's nightmare begins in September 2014 when 8-year-old Hiawayi Robinson leaves her apartment to play but never returns. The desperate search to find her leads investigators to surveillance footage that sends shockwaves through the community.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: Speaking for the Dead
programme.desc: In 'the city too busy to hate,' investigators at Atlanta Homicide have three murders on their hands after a woman is gunned down and two teens are shot in their car.

programme.title: Murder in the Chat Room
programme.desc: After her marriage fails, 28-year-old Samantha decides to give online dating a try. Just a few months later, police find her brutally murdered and must track her online footprint through different chat rooms to unmask her killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Seen at Susan's
programme.desc: On April 12th 2008, Susan Casey vanishes after a night out. The only clues left behind are suspicious drag marks outside her home. CCTV footage reveals three different suspects on the scene. The police must find out who is lying.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Reuschel vs. Reuschel
programme.desc: A wealthy Florida businessman is arrested after a violent confrontation with his wife, and his daughter's sumptuous wedding may have inspired his murderous rage.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: A Shot in the Night
programme.desc: 33 year-old single mother, Lindsey Wilkins in found shot in the head by an apparent suicide. When no gun is found, police suspect murder and soon uncover a trail of dark secrets and deadly betrayals. Then a shocking twist puts the case in jeopardy.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: Online Secrets
programme.desc: In 2014, the scorched remains of a house fire reveal two female victims, a 17 year old girl named Mani and her mother Robin. When investigators dig deeper into the women's lives, they uncover a secret online relationship that led to tragedy.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Silent Killer
programme.desc: Diane Girts is found dead in the bathtub of her home adjoining her husband's funeral home, and nobody can determine exactly how she died. As the case unfolds, detectives will uncover troubling clues pointing to a cunning and dangerous killer.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: The Honeymoon Killers
programme.desc: A Belgian honeymoon comes to a tragic end when a freak car accident leads to a tragic death. The investigation takes police down a rabbit hole of violence and deceit, culminating in an international manhunt for a calculating killer.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Bizarre Love Triangle
programme.desc: Ann returns home from shopping to find her husband, Anthony, lifeless in bed, a gun beside him. Police soon find a second victim, Jacqueline Riggs, in the basement, stabbed to death. What happened here is a dark tale of love, lust and violence.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Defenseless
programme.desc: A car races up to the ER of a Westchester hospital. Carlos Perez-Olivo, the driver, has been shot in his side and his wife, Peggy has been shot in the head. What horror has befallen this couple? The answer will challenge even experienced investigators.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: Crossing Bad Creek Bridge
programme.desc: Two young girls are found shot to death on the side of a rural Oklahoma road. The case gets national attention, and no one is sure what would lead anyone to murder two young girls. Then, four years later, police find evidence in an unlikely place.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: Beware the Green-Eyed Monster
programme.desc: Jimmy Sims, a man who owned and operated a boxing gym in the town of Galena Park, Texas, is shot in his driveway. His wife points the finger at the son of his mistress, but police must look at everyone who knew him.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: Small Town Girl, Big City Murder
programme.desc: A 22-year-old woman moves from a small town in Arkansas to St. Louis, Missouri to spread her wings and conquer bigger things, but then she turns up dead on the floor of her apartment.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: No Body No Crime
programme.desc: Detective Postiglione is investigating a crime scene with a unique challenge: there is no victim. Pools of blood indicate something terrible occurred, but the young woman is nowhere to be found. It's up to Pat to find her and a possible murderer.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Cris-Cross
programme.desc: In 2004, Detective Postiglione investigates the rare double homicide of two young college students in an apartment near a Nashville university. When a third victim is gunned down, a state-wide manhunt in launched to find the killer.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Air McNair
programme.desc: Retired NFL superstar Steve McNair is found shot to death along with his young mistress. Pat Postigilone reveals the true story of his investigation and its shocking conclusion, which has become the most talked about murder mystery in Nashville history.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Adolf Hitler
programme.desc: On June 22, 1941, Adolf Hitler launches the largest military offensive in history against the Soviet Union: Operation Barbarossa. Blinded by his fire power, Hitler signs his death sentence.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Charles de Gaulle
programme.desc: June 16, 1940. Paris has fallen to the Nazis and the German conquest of France is almost complete. Prime Minister Henri Petain plans to sign an armistice with Nazi Germany, but French General Charles de Gaulle secedes and rebels against the policy.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Adolf Hitler
programme.desc: On June 22, 1941, Adolf Hitler launches the largest military offensive in history against the Soviet Union: Operation Barbarossa. Blinded by his fire power, Hitler signs his death sentence.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Charles de Gaulle
programme.desc: June 16, 1940. Paris has fallen to the Nazis and the German conquest of France is almost complete. Prime Minister Henri Petain plans to sign an armistice with Nazi Germany, but French General Charles de Gaulle secedes and rebels against the policy.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Leaders
programme.desc: From Winston Churchill and Adolf Hitler, to Mao Tse Tung and Saddam Hussein, experts investigate what makes or breaks a war leader.

programme.title: Weaponology: Armored Personnel Carriers
programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Guns
programme.desc: A rapid-fire cannon that's becoming a hit with the US military; the personal defence weapon that has the same knockdown as bigger guns, the Gatling gun that rains fire on target and the new multi-calibre assault weapon.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Heirloom Home on the Shore
programme.desc: After 40 years of use, third-generation owners have decided to add facilities and living quarters to a family camp for large annual family reunions.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin For the Whole Family
programme.desc: Chase and the team come in to rebuild and ultimately repair this cabin for Laurence and his family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Lobster Legacy Shack
programme.desc: A couple inherited their quaint cabin from his grandfather, who originally built the cabin by hand in 1978. With a newly built wharf, the team focus on transforming the former fish and lobster shack into a fun family cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: The crew work to save an old cabin in Oakland, Maine, that Eric purchased from his father. He hopes the renovation will give the cabin many more years of life so he can shire his childhood memories there with his own children.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: It Takes a Village
programme.desc: Founded in 1935, Agassiz Village has provided underprivileged and at-risk kids an opportunity to experience camp. Chase and his team take on a big project with a small budget to help the camp with the support of the community.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Shaw Camp Re-Imagination
programme.desc: Following a two-year search, Greg and Denise uncovered their 'diamond in the rough' when they purchased a cabin that was untouched for years on the beautiful shore of Messalonskee Lake in Sidney.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Saulter
programme.desc: After relocating back to Maine, a family of five has been cramped in their small cabin on a peninsula overlooking Great Pond. Chase and the team want to expand the footprint of their home, but they must work fast to finish the restoration before winter.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Pilsbury Family Rafting Cabin
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned Maine cabins. They give these forlorn properties the facelift they've needed for decades. You never know what you might find when you go for a walk.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Shaw Camp Re-Imagination
programme.desc: Following a two-year search, Greg and Denise uncovered their 'diamond in the rough' when they purchased a cabin that was untouched for years on the beautiful shore of Messalonskee Lake in Sidney.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Saulter
programme.desc: After relocating back to Maine, a family of five has been cramped in their small cabin on a peninsula overlooking Great Pond. Chase and the team want to expand the footprint of their home, but they must work fast to finish the restoration before winter.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From a High School into Purposed Goods
programme.desc: The crew save parts from a 1917 high school up in Youngwood, PA.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A New World of Challenges
programme.desc: Three news teams begin their projects and rookie builders Matt and Amy Hill quickly realize building in snow is more complicated than they planned. Mike and Dan Owens mill their own lumber while Jackie hires professionals to dig her foundation.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Snowball Effect
programme.desc: At Jackie's slippery build site, the team works to finish the subfloor and start raising walls, but rain and mud hinder them at every step. Meanwhile, the Hills are forced to dig their supplies out of three feet of snow.

programme.title: Building Alaska: This Is the Sketchy Part
programme.desc: The Hills work on their first floor framing, but work slows to a stop when their tools begin to freeze. The Owens work on installing the second story gables, while Jackie and her team work to finish the cabin's roof structure.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Have Saw, Will Cut
programme.desc: Jackie's team delivers French Doors only to find the frame fits incorrectly during installation. A snow machine delivery runs into problems on the melted trail at the Hill's build site.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Gotta Be Efficient
programme.desc: Jackie's team hears propane leaking somewhere in their cabin as they install the cabinets and stove. Melting trails makes the delivery of cabinets and appliances dangerous at the Owens' build site.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Streamside Cottage
programme.desc: Professional treehouse builder Michael 'Murph' Murphy wants to build a cottage retreat for his family in Washington. He enlists his friends to create a natural siding and a massive fishing net for lounging above the living space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Edge of Maine
programme.desc: A creative family builds a three-story tiny house full of clever features in the easternmost property in the U.S. But with limited experience and a tight deadline, they'll need the help of a few locals to get it done. Follow their journey now.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Smoky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: A family of five builds a forever home on their 46-acre property overlooking the Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Mountain Lodges
programme.desc: A Colorado couple attempts to build one of the most energy-efficient homesteads in the state. Mother Nature and bleeding edge technologies give them a run for their money as they race to complete their high-end alpine lodge before winter hits.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manhattan
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek brings him to Manhattan for historic pizza-by-the-slice, a transcendent take on an Old World baked good and over five pounds of undefeated dessert in the Giant Ice Cream Scoop Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Washington, DC
programme.desc: Adam's hunger takes him to Washington, DC, to 'Horace and Dickie's' and 'Ben's Chilli Bowl'.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most Perfect Pork
programme.desc: Casey's eating odyssey has taken him all over the country and back again, and it's finally time to honour the best of the best. We're counting down the five most perfect pork dishes in Man v. Food history.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food fling finds him in Lafayette, La., for savoury Cajun stew and a stuffed and spicy sandwich specialty. He also accepts the Devil's Bowl Challenge- a scorching-hot bowl of ramen.

programme.title: Good Eats: Coconut Cake Revival
programme.desc: Host Alton Brown wants to know if it's possible to make a great cake with coconut from a can and he's willing to crack open as many nuts as it takes to make a slice of paradise on a plate.

programme.title: Good Eats: Sub Standards
programme.desc: Alton Brown and a handful of substitute chefs as they take on a few good recipes with one ingredient tied behind their backs.

programme.title: Good Eats: Fishing Whole
programme.desc: Confront your phobias as the fearless host roasts, planks and fries up some fish.

programme.title: Good Eats: Withering Bites
programme.desc: Dried fruit may not be glamorous, but what it lacks in fashion, it more than makes up for in flavor and versatility. Before your good fruit goes bad, take a tip from host Alton Brown and dry it.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Austin
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern uncovers the one-of-a-kind tastes of Austin, Texas, a city known for 'keeping things weird.' This city excels at meaty classics like barbecue brisket, Texas chili and 10-gallon-hat-sized chicken fried steak.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bogota
programme.desc: Andrew explores the sky-high flavors of Bogota, Colombia. This mountaintop city keeps warm with hearty potato soup, whole-roasted stuffed pork, egg filled arepas, their unique take on the tamale and cheesy hot chocolate.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Orlando
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Orlando, Florida, to discover the incredible rich food scene that's often left in the shadow of Disney World.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: St. Louis
programme.desc: Andrew heads to St. Louis to get his fill of comfort food. He savors barbecued pig snoots, indulges in a modern Midwestern incarnation of traditional Italian fare and slurps noodles at one of the hottest new spots for East Asian fare.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New Hampshire Seacoast
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores New Hampshire's seacoast and finds that the bounty of the local waters is the star of the local cuisine, such as shrimp, scallops and haddock stuffed in a baked lobster and loaded into a chowder.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dallas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the big and bold flavors that are decidedly Dallas. From comforting chicken fried steak and sweet, creamy pecan pie to hearty tortilla soup and steak aged for 240 days.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chiang Mai
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the most iconic foods of Chiang Mai, Thailand. From coconut curry soup to a signature sausage with pork and chile paste, fish roasted in banana leaves to minced pork salad, the northern city has a regional cuisine unlike any other.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Phnom Penh
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern discovers the complex flavors of Phnom Penh, Cambodia. Spicy grilled crab, cold and refreshing beef salad and herbaceous fish and noodle soup reflect a mission to preserve the uniqueness of Cambodian cuisine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Austin

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Local Legends
programme.desc: Alfonso takes you on a tour of local legends, from Tennessee's iconic Jack Daniel's Whiskey to the Fannie May factory in Ohio where sweet Buckeyes are made. He also finds out how a novel mix of hard candy and gum became the Charms Blow Pop.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Tongue Twister
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro tries Warheads Extreme Sour Hard Candy, a treat that almost requires a warning label, sees how Frank's RedHot gets its heat and takes a peek at a dynamite mole sauce from Rico Chicken Tamales.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Happy Birthday
programme.desc: Michael McKean makes everyone's birthday wishes come true as he celebrates the best holiday of the year. He discovers that birthday cake was born during a revolution and that a bowl of Chinese noodles can bring you more birthdays to celebrate.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Game Night
programme.desc: Michael McKean goes into the wild to hunt for juicy game meat myths and fresh fish fibs. He calls foul on duck a l'orange with its so-called French origins and throws a line at wicked tuna to find out how we got hooked on tuna melts.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Wicked Good
programme.desc: Michael McKean celebrates Halloween by investigating dishes that are so good they're downright wicked! He's uncovering rhubarb pie's paranormal proclivities and does a background check on ramen with its racy rap sheet.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Baked Goodies
programme.desc: Michael McKean throws the carb-free diet out the window and uncovers the stories behind our favorite baked goodies. He starts by revealing that cupcakes are edible equations and explaining how the whoopie pie nearly caused a civil war.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: I'm Stuffed
programme.desc: Michael McKean goes on a spectacular journey of some super stuffed foods. Find out if bao are good enough to save our necks, if toasted ravioli are a big stuffed lie and whether knishes could once land you in jail.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Dishes In Disguise
programme.desc: All is not what it seems as Michael McKean reveals the truth behind dishes in disguise. He uncovers what it took to make turducken tick, and how it takes more than magic to get soup inside soup dumplings.

programme.title: Good Eats: Et Tu Mame
programme.desc: That culinary chameleon the soybean turns up as edamame when host Alton Brown takes it from the sushi bar and into the kitchen.

programme.title: Good Eats: Flat Is Beautiful: Going Crackers
programme.desc: Alton Brown proves that the humble cracker is vastly improved by a homemade approach.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics III: Creole in a Bowl
programme.desc: Alton looks at the cultures that influenced New Orleans beans and rice.

programme.title: Good Eats: Switched on Baklava
programme.desc: Phyllo dough can be finicky but host Alton Brown tames this difficult pastry to create that wonderfully layered dessert known as baklava.

programme.title: Good Eats: A Cabbage Sprouts in Brussels
programme.desc: Reluctantly agreeing to help refurbish the reputation of Brussels sprouts, host Alton Brown discovers that with the proper preparation they can make a surprising range of good eats.

programme.title: Good Eats: Ginger: Rise of the Rhizome
programme.desc: When a fairy tale figure seeks host Alton Brown's help in spicing up his personality, it leads to the exploration of that zesty rhizome ginger.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Hamburgers
programme.desc: The deceptively simple ground meat served on a bun with the perfect combo of condiments and garnishes.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Pork
programme.desc: Roger Mooking travels the country to discover the top fifteen greatest pork dishes.

programme.desc: Pip and Freddy deliver a baby Penguin to Pip's hometown. When Pip and Freddy break the conveyor belt at T.O.T.S. they are determined to fix it on their own.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Snowy Gablooey/ Gooooal!
programme.desc: Doc treats a frozen Oooey Gablooey after Donny accidently leaves him out in the snow. Doc helps Sir Kirby realize the importance of reporting an injury right away after he injures his arm during a game of ice hockey.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Double Doggie Dare!/ Empire State of Mind
programme.desc: When a trip to the Empire State Building is cancelled, Bob signs up for a game show; The pugs want to bring the Empire State Building to Bob.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Suitcase Switcheroo / More Cowbell for Bob
programme.desc: When Bob mixes up his suitcase with another traveler, the pugs head to Spain on a mission to retrieve it. Then, Bob can't find his signature instrument for the reunion of his high school rock band.

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Danger Begins
programme.desc: 13-year-old Henry Hart lands a part time job as Kid Danger, the sidekick-in-training to superhero Captain Man. After promising to keep his new identity a secret, Henry must navigate a double life.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Exit Stage Theft
programme.desc: Max tries to reestablish his evil cred with petty crimes, but when his best friends become a target, he must choose between his them and his reputation.

programme.title: The Thundermans: One Hit Thunder
programme.desc: When Max uses personal information about Phoebe and Link in a song for his band, he causes a rift in their relationship. Meanwhile, Hank and Barb try to teach Billy and Nora a valuable lesson.

programme.title: Danger Force: Mime Games
programme.desc: Bose must try and stop The Toddler from breaking into The Man's Nest when Danger Force and Captain man are called to Paris.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Plain Faces
programme.desc: Dylan doesn't want to attend school, and does whatever it takes to avoid going, including convincing little Charlie not to go, either.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Pipe Down/ The Big Scoop
programme.desc: Timmy imposes silence; AJ and Chester try to expose Timmy as a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: King Chang/ The End of the Universe-ity
programme.desc: Mark Chang is called back to the planet Yugopotamia; Dark Laser's back.

programme.title: The Loud House: Study Muffin/ Homespun
programme.desc: The kids complain about their house, but when a tornado threatens to destroy it, they start to feel differently.

programme.title: The Loud House: Stage Plight/ Antiqued Off
programme.desc: Hoping to get closer to her crush, Benny, Luan tries out for the school play. When Clyde and schoolmate Zach bond over antiques, Lincoln finds himself feeling like a third wheel.

programme.title: The Loud House: Intern for the Worse/ The Old and the Restless
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde both get an internship at Flip's and compete to win the manager title. When Lincoln sees how tame Pop Pop has gotten in his older age, he takes him out for a day to remember.

programme.title: The Loud House: Baby Steps/ Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: When Clyde thinks his parents are having another baby he goes to Lincoln for help on how to be a great big brother. When Lori and Leni both buy the same dress, a fight breaks out leading to Defcon five in the Loud house.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Guess Who's Shopping for Dinner/ New Roomie
programme.desc: Abuela teaches Ronnie Anne that getting ingredients for dinner is no small task. When Vito's apartment floods, the kids try to find an apartment that suits him best.

programme.title: The Loud House: Suite and Sour/ Back in Black
programme.desc: After Mom and Dad win a trip to a resort, they decide to take the kids. When Lucy gets a crush on a 'normal' boy, her sisters give her a makeover.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Life Insurance/ Burst Your Bubble
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding, SpongeBob and Patrick try to prove their life insurance protects them from any danger. When SpongeBob blows himself a bubble boat, everyone in town wants one. Everyone except Mrs. Puff, that is.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pineapple Invasion/ Idiot Sauce
programme.desc: When SpongeBob hides the secret formula in his home, it's up to Gary to protect it from Plankton. When a freak accident causes everyone in town to become as stupid as Patrick, Sandy must save the day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Curse of Bikini Bottom / Squidward in Clarinetland
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick disturb the Flying Dutchman's slumber and he turns them into ghosts.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Slumber Party/ Grooming Gary
programme.desc: Mr. Krab's enlists SpongeBob's help to be an undercover spy at Pearl's slumber party.

programme.title: It's Pony: Pet Pony/ Dog Day
programme.desc: When pets are banned from the building, Annie and Pony have to convince the landlord to reconsider. When the dog from next door, Pony's sworn enemy, comes to stay with them, Annie needs to find a way to make them get along.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shellback Shenanigans/ Hide and Then What Happens?
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick play hide n' seek and SpongeBob searches the world for Patrick. Plankton masquerades as Gary to steal the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squid's Visit/ To Squarepants or Not to Squarepants
programme.desc: SpongeBob decorates his home like Squidward's so that his neighbour will visit. All of SpongeBob's square pants have shrunk in the dryer, and he can't find any square pants anywhere.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Home Sweet Rubble
programme.desc: SpongeBob asks for help from the community to remodel his home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Play's the Thing/ Rodeo Daze
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs opens a diner. SpongeBob takes his pals to Texas to see Sandy in a squirrel rodeo.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Fish in Town/ Love That Squid
programme.desc: A new neighbour moves in and becomes Squidward’s best friend.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: You Don't Know Sponge/ Tunnel of Glove
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick take a friendship test. Pearl is embarrassed when she must sit next to SpongeBob in the Tunnel of Glove.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pet or Pests/ Komputer Overload
programme.desc: SpongeBob adopts a stray worm, which soon gives birth to a litter of baby worms.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Accidents Will Happen/ The Other Patty
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs is manipulated into caring for Squidward when he gets injured on the job. Mr. Krabs and Plankton both have troubles at the new 'Flabby Patty' restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mooncation/ Mr. Krabs Takes a Vacation
programme.desc: SpongeBob house-sits for Sandy, and all is quiet until Patrick shows up. After losing their passes, SpongeBob and Squidward try to sneak backstage at the sold-out Kelpy G show.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Man Ray Returns/ Larry the Floor Manager
programme.desc: When Man Ray rents Squidward's house for the weekend, it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to stop his evil vacation. Mr. Krabs takes a vacation and makes Larry the Lobster the temporary manager of the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Chosen Chipmunk/ Double Dangus
programme.desc: Alvin sneaks into Simon's new virtual reality game and is transported to a world in desperate need of a hero. The chipmunks discover Officer Dangus has a twin brother.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Lights Camera Uh-Oh/ Wax Dave
programme.desc: The Chipmunks have 48 hours to help Jeanette make a student film. But every chipmunk has a very different movie in mind. The Chipmunks follow Dave and find out he's fallen in love with a dangerous woman who wants to turn him into a wax statue.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Art for Art's Sake/ Mancave
programme.desc: Brittany takes up painting to impress her fashion idol. But her idol only likes her art after Alvin accidentally ruins it. Alvin, convinced that Julie and her son are trying to move into their home, tries to stop it.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Shelf Life
programme.desc: Timmy poofs Tom Sawyer out of a book to help him with his summer book report project. But when Tom cons Cosmo out of his wand, Timmy, Cosmo and Wanda have to chase him through several classic books to get the wand back.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Catman Meets the Crimson Chin/ Genie Menie Minie Mo
programme.desc: The superhero TV show, 'Catman,' may be out of production, but its star, TV's Adam West will never rest as long as there are crimes to avenge. Timmy accidentally releases a Genie from a magic lava lamp.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Ultra Sheen / Sleepless in Retroville
programme.desc: Jimmy invents a machine that maximizes sleepover fun, but Carl sits on a keyboard, and mistakenly creates a pizza-monster that causes trouble.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Maximum Hugh/ Aaughh! Wilderness!
programme.desc: Jimmy outfits his dad with a bionic sweatband to give their team the competitive edge.

programme.title: T.U.F.F. Puppy
programme.desc: A dim-witted dog is recruited into a super-secret crime-fighting organization.

programme.title: Back at the Barnyard
programme.desc: Otis and his friends have adventures while trying to protect the farm they live on.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Talkin' Teddy/ Principal Interest
programme.desc: Theodore's new talking-teddy bear is driving Alvin and Simon nuts. Alvin is none-too thrilled about going back to school. That is until he sees the new Principal and then it's love at first sight.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Alvin's Wild Weekend/ For Whom the Bell Tolls
programme.desc: Alvin begs Dave to spend a weekend alone with him. A hypnotist accidentally turns Simon into a bumbling fool before an academic contest.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Super Heroes/ She's Got Style
programme.desc: When Theodore thinks he's a real superhero, Alvin and Simon have a tough time convincing him he's not. Brittany is embarrassed by Jeanette's lack of style until Jeanette is proclaimed a fashion trendsetter by Brittany's icon.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mutiny/ Reality or Not
programme.desc: Desperate to avenge last year's loss, The Chipmunks argue over who is best suited to lead them to victory. Later, Alvin is tired of seeing his celebrity status overshadowed by Reality TV stars. So, he decides to become one.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Wormquake!
programme.desc: Facing Shredder's deadly new assassin, Leo must decide whether to risk his brother's lives or ask for Splinter's help. Donnie must put aside his rivalry with Casey in order to uncover a new Kraang plot.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Tuba Triumph
programme.desc: After witnessing a boy being bullied, Ravi takes him under his wing.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Sound and Fury
programme.desc: The Rangers’ skills are put to the test when Blaze uses evil tech to massively enhance his Robotron’s destructive power.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Bug Busters
programme.desc: The Turtles look for a way to eliminate New York City's oozesquito problem.

programme.title: It's Pony: Gerry's Tour/ Loud Horse
programme.desc: Annie and Pony try to help Gerry pass the test to become a museum tour guide. When a noisy neighbor drives Annie to the brink, she and Pony have to find a way to quiet her down.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Totally Awesome Battle Jack
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Dude, We're Getting the Band Back Together!
programme.desc: The kids put on a concert in the backyard featuring their parents' favourite old band when Dad forgets his anniversary with Mom.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Traffic Cam Caper/ Bowl-R-Rama Drama
programme.desc: Candace tried to prove her brothers inventions by getting footage from a traffic camera.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Phantom and the Sorceress!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Small Hiro One
programme.desc: Hiro becomes frustrated when he’s deemed too young to attend a science workshop hosted by SFIT’s most famous alumni, Dr. Trevor Trengrove.

programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Act Your Age
programme.desc: The kids are all teenagers for an episode as a result of someone behind the scenes answering a letter from the mailbag. Phineas has a crush on Isa, Candace has given up busting, and Doof is selling inators for cash.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mommy Can You Hear Me?/ Road Trip
programme.desc: After Candace injures her ankle and is told to stay in bed, Phineas and Ferb provide her with a box of items to stave off her boredom.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: The Owl House: The First Day
programme.desc: During Luz's first day of Magic School, curiosity gets the best of her, and she finds herself thrown into the Delinquent Track, where she's not allowed to learn magic.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Doonkleberry Imperative/ Buford Confidential
programme.desc: The boys go out in search of Doonkelberries so that Mom can make her famous pie.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: What a Croc!/ Ferb TV
programme.desc: When the boys learn that the famous Crikey the Crocodile has gone missing, they set out to find and return him to his home at the Danville Nature Preserve.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Belly of the Beast/ Moon Farm
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb construct a mechanical shark. The boys take a cow to the moon in order to test a theory on the best tasking ice cream.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Just Passing Through/ Candace's Big Day
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create an orb that allows them to pass through solid objects and to ultimately, help them retrieve Mom's favourite guitar pick for her gig at the Mayor's Day Festival.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lost in Newtopia/ Sprig Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Anne and Polly vow to experience the city like locals but end up on a wild ride through the streets of Newtopia. Sprig is offered a spot at Newtopia University.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.desc: A young girl sneaks out of her house to meet a movie star who invited her to a party. Later that night, a patrolman finds her in an alley, sexually assaulted and barely alive. Benson suspects the movie star and his manager are covering up the crime.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Service
programme.desc: The SVU must break through military red tape when a soldier is suspected of sexual assault.

programme.title: Modern Family: Sleeper
programme.desc: Phil fails at his task to stay home and wait for the repairman, forcing him to tell an elaborate lie to hide the truth from Claire, but the stress is more than he can physically handle. Meanwhile, Gloria is responsible for organizing the family portrait.

programme.title: Modern Family: Message Received
programme.desc: Jay, Gloria and Manny challenge each other to step outside their comfort zone and try something new. Mitch and Cam's wedding is getting too big and costly, so they resort to selling a couple of their prized possessions.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Wedding
programme.desc: Mitch and Cam’s big day is finally here and nothing can ruin it, until nothing turns into a whole lot of somethings and puts wedding planner extraordinaire Pepper Saltzman to the test. Jay and Gloria host the Tuckers. Phil squeezes in an eye procedure.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Wedding
programme.desc: The wedding day chaos continues as the entire party shifts from one contingency plan to another. Guests start to get testy, Mitchell and Cameron are feeling discouraged and poor Claire shows physical wear and tear.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Long Honeymoon
programme.desc: This summer has been exceptionally blissful in the Dunphy house. Alex is away on a humanitarian trip and the rest of the family is getting along swimmingly, but when Alex comes home, there is an immediate shift in mood.

programme.title: Modern Family: Do Not Push
programme.desc: It's Jay and Gloria's anniversary and they can't seem to get on the same page on what kind of gift to give; sentimental or expensive. And, the Dunphys head to Caltech for Alex's college tour.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Design
programme.desc: A distraught pregnant girl accuses a wealthy and successful businessman of rape.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Ripped

programme.title: Dateline: The Goldfinger Mystery
programme.desc: A married couple made an abundance of wealth in gold, but the fortune was never the key to their happiness. In fact, it may have been a motive for murder as business practices are questioned and secrets are finally confessed.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets in a Small Town
programme.desc: A mother of three went missing from her home in Alabama, and the news the family received would haunt them forever.

programme.desc: When a researcher with the Department of Defence is found dead, Nell puts her high IQ to the test when she goes undercover as his replacement. Meanwhile, Hetty's ability to lead the team is questioned by the new NCIS Assistant Director, Owen Granger.

programme.title: NCIS: Reveille

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: In Plain View
programme.desc: Jane and the squad team up with another detective who believes they are both hunting for the same killer. Meanwhile, after discovering her identity has been stolen, Maura enlists the help of Angela to find the culprit.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Bite Out of Crime
programme.desc: The squad puts in overtime on the hunt for a serial killer sniper. Maura makes friends with a witness to the crime but he has a mental condition that causes him to believe he is a wolf.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Family Matters
programme.desc: A woman finds her murdered husband and the investigation reveals the man may have been living a double life.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: The Platform
programme.desc: When it appears one of their own shot an unarmed man on a busy Boston subway platform, the team must fight to find the real killer while clearing their detective's name. It becomes clear that the circumstances surrounding the shooting are not clear.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Bassholes
programme.desc: Jane and Maura find themselves submerged in the cutthroat, high-stakes world of competitive bass fishing when a tournament-leading fisherman is killed. At the same time, Frankie is paying the price after losing a bet.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Imitation Game
programme.desc: The murder of a notorious thief sends Jane and Maura into the world of art heists and forgery, and forces Jane to tango with an FBI agent who has a keen interest in her case. There's also a new man in Angela's life.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Misconduct Game
programme.desc: The murder of a crime tech sends shockwaves throughout the team. When suspicions arise that the tech had tampered with evidence for BPD cases, Maura is suspended from her position. Jane is determined to catch the killer and clear the department.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Deadly Harvest
programme.desc: Jane and Maura are called out to the BCU 'body farm' (an academic research facility dedicated to the study of human decomposition) when a murder victim is found buried in a shallow grave among the research corpses.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: The Balancing Act: Your Health- Both Financial and Physical
programme.desc: How to save for the unexpected; how men can benefit from BioTE's Bioidentical Hormone Replacement Therapy; TruSculpt-Revolutionary non-surgical treatments; how to invest in gold and silver.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Into You Like a Train
programme.desc: As Meredith awaits a decision from Derek, her angst is interrupted when a train crash brings injured patients to the hospital. When Addison Shepherd notes Izzie's potential, Izzie must choose between professional gain and her friendship with Meredith.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Something to Talk About
programme.desc: Cristina, Izzie and Meredith pursue the case of Shane, a male patient who seems to have a hysterical pregnancy, which fascinates them and the entire medical staff. Elsewhere, a young patient inspires Alex to better express his feelings for Izzie.

programme.title: The Closer: Mom Duty
programme.desc: Deputy Chief Brenda Johnson has to deal with an unexpected visit from her mother. Brenda's boyfriend, Agent Fritz Howard, was planning to move in, but will have to put their move on hold. An investigation becomes more complicated with each clue.

programme.title: The Closer: Slippin'
programme.desc: Deputy Chief Brenda Johnson investigates the shooting of three youngsters. The shooting has all the marks of a gang related crime. Meanwhile Brenda must deal with her mother.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Pick Your Poison
programme.desc: After a bad batch of drugs claims the lives of two brothers, the race is on for the squad to find the dealer before more of their fellow high school students are threatened. Meanwhile, Rusty is feeling smothered by his new security detail.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Jailbait
programme.desc: When a newly released prisoner misses two back-to-back parole meetings, the squad is called in to track him down. Meanwhile, Sharon invites a therapist to the office to evaluate Rusty over a game of chess.

programme.title: Major Crimes: All In
programme.desc: When a body turns up at a posh country club in a quite neighbourhood, the squad's investigation leads them down a money trail full of surprises. Meanwhile, Flynn is noticeably distracted on the job and Rusty questions Emma's intentions.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Imitation Game
programme.desc: The murder of a notorious thief sends Jane and Maura into the world of art heists and forgery, and forces Jane to tango with an FBI agent who has a keen interest in her case. There's also a new man in Angela's life.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Eye for an Eye
programme.desc: After seventeen years on death row for a mass murder at Chuck E. Cheese's restaurant in Aurora, Nathan Dunlap's fate resides in the hands of one man, Governor John Hickenlooper.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Double Jeopardy
programme.desc: The wife and two children of an Air Force captain are murdered in Fayetteville, North Carolina, and Army sergeant Tim Hennis is sentenced to death for the crime.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Memory of Murder
programme.desc: A small-time Ohio drug dealer sits on death row for murdering a family, until a rookie attorney unearths long-hidden case records that shed new light on the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: After a girl was killed, investigators learn that cutting-edge technologies from NASA prove that the arrested suspect was not the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence
programme.desc: A young college student is found strangled and badly burned. Investigators get a break when a trace evidence expert uncovers the murder weapon in the spool of a vacuum.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Murder in the Mansion
programme.desc: An IT entrepreneur in Keller, Texas is killed in a deadly home invasion, but the evidence on the scene and his widow's account of the attack aren't adding up.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Death of the Socialite
programme.desc: When an Atlanta socialite is gunned down in her foyer, the search for her murderer leads investigators across the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her Florida home, and evidence at the scene is scarce. All signs point to burglary. The case goes cold until police get a tip from a canine behaviorist who points them in a different direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A popular disc jockey is found murdered in a community garden. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert lead police to the killer... and he’d been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.
